faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: Can School of Art and Design, ITM University - Gwalior be considered as a reputed Institute?
faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at School of Art and Design, ITM University - Gwalior are B.Sc., UG Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, School of Art and Design, ITM University - Gwalior has a rating of 5 by students. college_info.intro:
The most popular courses of ITM Gwaliorare include BTech, BSc, MBA and UG Diploma. These courses are offered in a variety of specialisations. ITM Gwalior courses are offered for the duration of 2- 4 years in full-time mode.
To seek admission with any of the programme, candidates need to secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12. Apart from that, the University considers entrance exam scores of JEE Main, ITM NEST, CUET, CAT, MAT and others based on the eligibility criteria as per the course.
ITM University Gwalior fees structure varies depending on the course opted for. It offers a BTech within the tuition fee of INR 4.04 Lakh- INR 8.08 Lakh, while for programme such as BSc, ITM Gwalior tuition fees is INR 1.8 Lakh- INR 12 Lakh. The University offers an MBA with the tuition fee of INR 2.4 Lakh- INR 6.12 LAkh.
To learn more about the ITM Gwalior popular programmes, check out the details given below:

placements.overview:
According to the brochure of the institute, the highest and average package received by students during ITM University Gwalior placements 2024 stood at INR 45 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively. More than 800 companies visited the campus in 2024.

The Training and Placement Cell of the university provides comprehensive career support to students. The goal of the placement cell is to bridge the gap between industry expectations and academic knowledge. ITM University Gwalior placement cell not only offers placement assistance to students but also provide career counselling services and offer training programs and sessions on developing technical skills, leadership qualities and communication skills.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    In the past three years, more than 3,000 students have been placed during ITM University Gwalior placements. Further, the overall placement rate recorded in 2024 was 95%.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ITM University offers more than 50 UG, PG, Integrated, Diploma and PhD courses. The University has different schools in the disciplines of Science, Engineering and Technology, Art & Design, Computer Applications, Management, Education, Physical Education and Law. The UG courses of the University include BBA, BCom/ BCom (Hons), BSc, B.Ed, BTech, BALLB, BPharma, BCom LLB, BA/ BA (Hons). At PG level, it offers MBA, MTech, MCA, MPharma etc. The fee structure covers a minimum of INR 16,000 to a highest of INR 12 Lakh. The fees changes from course to course, depending on the level and duration of the course. Here are the details the Universuty courses and fees:

Therefore, for the full two-year duration of the program, the total cost would be Rs 8.90 Lakhs.MBA iConnect Program: The MBA iConnect programme at ITM University, Raipur is priced slightly higher, at Rs 5.45 Lakhs per year. Thus, the total cost for the two-year duration would amount to Rs 10.90 Lakhs.
faqs.question: How much does MBA at ITM University, Raipur cost?

faqs.answer: A:    ITM University, Gwalior offers various programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and PhD levels across streams like science, arts, management, law, and others. Admission criteria to ITM University Gwalior courses are either entrance-specific or merit based. The criteria can vary as per the courses. For some courses, ITM University Gwalior accepts admissions based on the score achieved by the student in national state level entrance exams. For admissions to the majority of courses, ITM conducts its own its own entrance exam ITM NEST. Thus, cracking it to ITM University Gwalior can be hard because of the level of competition.
faqs.question: Is ITM University, Gwalior hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    ITM University, Gwalior offers various specialisations in BTech, MBA, BSc, UG Diploma, Certificate, MSc, BPT, BMLT etc. The University offers these programmes with the tuition fees ranging between INR 16 K- INR 8.1 Lakh. The ITM University, Gwalior fee structure may vary depending on the level and duration of the programme. Apart from the tuition fees, all the programmes entail one-time fees, which may vary course to course.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good enough college for most of the courses.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend entirely on the course we choose. In B.Sc (hons.) Agriculture, many students prefer to go for higher studies instead of looking for a job right away, so I'd say it's good for other courses but not so much for agriculture itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel here is quite basic, with all general facilities that are essential for the survival of a student. Classrooms are good, clean, and spacious. The food here is really bad, not because of the quality itself, but the taste.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Peaceful campus and good teaching, but limited agriculture-specific opportunities.

review_content.Placements: 70% students are placed from my course. 45 LPA is the highest package, and 6 LPA is the average. Visa Steel, FedEx recruit. 40-50% students get internships. Quality testing, entry-level argo jobs, and agriculture-related roles are offered. Many students say agriculture-specific placements are limited.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are very decent, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7. In the hostel, beds and rooms are very good. Food is good compared to others. The hostel is on campus with security and basic amenities. The college conducts sports every week.

reviews_list.review_title: My university is the best in Madhya Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: Top role of the minister of the office to the least of the course. The lowest package is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 45 LPA. Many companies come here like Wipro, TCS, Tech Mahindra, etc. Of all courses, BCA has the best opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available with the best speed, and the library has excellent facilities. Classrooms and labs are available in the university. Medical facilities are also available. Canteen, sports facilities, food, and messes are provided in the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Robotics and Automation) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and culture here.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in 2024, with 3,304 students placed in the last three years. The highest package is INR 45 LPA, with some reviews mentioning packages up to INR 36 LPA. Top companies are Microsoft, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Google, Salesforce, and others. Roles are offered in industry sectors like IT, management, finance, pharmaceuticals, and agriculture.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a sprawling campus with modern facilities, including computer labs, library, gym, sports ground, and hostels. It has 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. On-campus transport is available. Wi-Fi is available in all departments including library and administration area.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: ITM university is good, but placement is not good.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not good. 10 students got placed, only 3-4 students got placed in a tech company, and the other students got placed in a non-tech company. This university is so bad in placement record, no company comes to this university many times, and students apply off-campus because no companies related to tech that visit.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is good, 3 times food, and breakfast 2 times, you can eat anything every day, the variety is different. The infrastructure is also so good, and the best quality, and all types of facilities are available, 24-hour electricity, playground, sports, and a gym are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure and a supportive learning environment.

review_content.Placements: A large number of students have been placed in my course, BBA. Highest package is 7 LPA, average package is around 4-5 LPA, and lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting company was Microsoft. I don't know the actual percentage, but around 85% got an internship from BBA. Top roles offered were manager role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is reliable and fast. Lab has a modern pc and Windows 10 installed. Classrooms are well furnished. Library has modern technology and an attendance record in it.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and very easy to approach. They are well qualified and knowledgeable. They have very good experience in teaching. Teachers' quality is good, and they have excellent communication skills. Course curriculum is up to date, and the syllabus is also up to date. Faculty is very good and understanding, helping the student to solve the problems they face during exams and during class

course_faqs.question: Are there any scholarships or grants for BBA students at ITM University Gwalior?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, ITM University Gwalior offers multiple scholarships for its students officially pursuing a BBA course from the university. Students who wish to get a seat must take the ITM NEST admission-cum-scholarship test. As per the rules, only 10% of admitted students to a programme will receive this scholarship. Moreover, students who are receiving any other scholarships are not eligible for this scholarship.

course_faqs.question: What is the BBA fee at ITM Gwalior?
course_faqs.answer: ITM University, Gwalior BBA programme or Bachelor of Business Administration is a UG level, 3 years programme. Candidates must secure a minimum of 60% aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised board. The ITM University, Gwalior BBA total tuition fee is INR 3 Lakh along with a one-time payment as caution money of INR 5 K.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Tech Mechanical Engineering course at ITM University, Gwalior
overview_faqs.answer: The fees for the B.Tech Mechanical Engineering path at ITM University, Gwalior, is INR 95,000 in keeping with year. This amount covers tuition fees, library prices, laboratory expenses, and different miscellaneous fees. It is vital to observe that fees can also vary slightly from yr to year because of inflation and other factors. College students may incur additional costs for observe substances, lodging, and other residing charges. In addition you can check the official website.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BSc in Forensic Science fee at ITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: ITM University, Gwalior offers BSc in Forensic Sciences as a 4 year UG level programme. The University offers this full-time programme with a total tuition fees of INR 3.96 Lakh along with INR 5 K as a one-time payment which includes refundable caution money. The total course fees for a 4 year BSc in Forensic Science at ITM University, Gwalior is INR 4.01 Lakh.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM University Gwalior Admission 2025 (Open): Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: ITM University, Gwalior admission 2025 is open. The institute offers a wide range of UG, PG, Integrated, Diploma and PhD courses through its different schools namely— theSchool of Engineeringand Technology, Computer Applications, Management, Education, Art & Design, Science, Physical Education and Law.ITM Universityaccepts admissions to its courses on an entrance basis. Students need to clear the institute's entrance test;ITM NEST. The institute also accepts valid scores obtained by the candidates in other national-level exams, such as CAT, CMAT, and more. Aspirants can get all the details regarding the admission procedure, criteria, scholarships, and courses offered at the university in the following article.

ITM University Gwalioroffers admissions to its courses based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. It also accepts valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams. All of the courses offered at ITM University are in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forITM University admissions 2025:
ITM University Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
30+ (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma| Certificate
Popular programmes
BSc| BTech| MTech| MBA
Download Brochure
ITM University Prospectus

ITM University course admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university offers courses through its 14 schools of study. Further, it offers variousintegrated, diploma and PhD coursesin disciplines ofScience, Management, Engineering & Technology, Education and more. ITM University admission for some courses is granted on the basis of valid scores in the national/state-level entrance exams. The university also conducts its own entrance exam—ITM NEST for admission to the majority of the courses. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria forITM University Gwalior courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50%; For MBA in Pharmaceutical and Sales Management, candidates must have a UG or PG degree in science stream with a 55% aggregate

Class 12 in any stream with an aggregate of 50%

The admission procedure for ITM University includes several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. The college accepts admissions to its programmes on scores obtained by the students in the entrance exams. Interested candidates can visit the college's official website to obtain the application form. The entire application process is online. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of ITM University:
Step 1: ITM University Application Process

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website of ITM University to fill out the application form online. Candidates need to select the desired course, fill in all the specified details, pay the application fee and upload the required documents to complete the registration. Students can either purchase the application form from the admission campus or choose to fill out the form online.
Step 2: ITM University Selection Process

ITM University shortlists applicants on the basis of merit obtained in entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, and CMAT. For some of the courses, written tests, interviews, and group discussions will be conducted and will be considered for admissions, with due consideration of academic records and work experience.
Step 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, they will have to go through counselling for seat allocation. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: ITM University Gwalior Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good enough college for most of the courses.
reviews.review_text: The hostel here is quite basic, with all general facilities that are essential for the survival of a student. Classrooms are good, clean, and spacious. The food here is really bad, not because of the quality itself, but the taste.

reviews.review_heading: Peaceful campus and good teaching, but limited agriculture-specific opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are very decent, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7. In the hostel, beds and rooms are very good. Food is good compared to others. The hostel is on campus with security and basic amenities. The college conducts sports every week.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by School of Computer Applications, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 24 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My university is the best in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available with the best speed, and the library has excellent facilities. Classrooms and labs are available in the university. Medical facilities are also available. Canteen, sports facilities, food, and messes are provided in the university.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and culture here.
reviews.review_text: It has a sprawling campus with modern facilities, including computer labs, library, gym, sports ground, and hostels. It has 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. On-campus transport is available. Wi-Fi is available in all departments including library and administration area.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by School of Computer Applications, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 30 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: ITM university is good, but placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good, 3 times food, and breakfast 2 times, you can eat anything every day, the variety is different. The infrastructure is also so good, and the best quality, and all types of facilities are available, 24-hour electricity, playground, sports, and a gym are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Management, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and a supportive learning environment.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is reliable and fast. Lab has a modern pc and Windows 10 installed. 
Classrooms are well furnished. Library has modern technology and an attendance record in it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Computer Applications, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with excellent placements and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Labs are excellent. Wi-Fi also has a better network. The department is also very helpful and good. Classrooms are neat and clean with well-maintained seats. Labs are also well-maintained, and computers work properly. A projector is also available in classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 27 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placement but the memories and friends are incredible.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, considering the fees charged to students. The classrooms are non-AC, and some do not have properly functioning fans. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus; however, access is limited to the Library Wi-Fi. Labs are decent, but the equipment is old and in fair condition.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by School of Management, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 18 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The overall infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-equipped with air conditioning in the classrooms, and cleanliness is maintained in the corridors. There are three canteens: one is near the hostel, another is in the center of the campus, and there is one Nescafé stall in the management block.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by School of Pharmacy, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 13 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college with the best facilities and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch like Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms and restrooms are clean. Library facilities and labs are well-equipped and most materials are provided. The canteen food is so tasty. Medical facilities are good. The quality of the food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: ITM University Gwalior: Celebrating dreams.
reviews.review_text: I'm a day scholar but I have seen the hostel facilities and both boy's and girls' hostels are on the campus and are very safe plus the mess is within walking distance. Hostels are very well protected and safe. The hygiene is well-maintained and the rooms are spacious and well furnished with basic needs of students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by School of Management, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 12 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best university in Management. Absolutely satisfied with academics, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have our academic building in the Leonardo Da Vinci Block, also known as the management block, where we have a huge central library, computer labs, AC classrooms, and a giant auditorium hall with full facilities and amenities, along with a separate cafe, clean washrooms, and fresh drinking water.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Computer Applications, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 10 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. There are chances to get the placement and facilities are also great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is overall good, there's greenery all along. Every side, every building is great. Every building has its Wi-Fi network, but sometimes it just doesn't get a signal. Labs are great with the large screens to teach and with the number of PCs. Classrooms are all air-conditioned. Library is also great, no one without ID can enter library as it has the ID scanners at the entrance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 20 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Quite good college, you can take it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is quite good, and new hostels have been built this year for 1st-year students. Facilities are also good, like Wi-Fi and a large number of labs. There is also a huge library. Hostels are quite good, but facilities in the mess are most likely bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, GwaliorReviewed on 6 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. It has good placements and well-educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available here. Grounds are available for games like basketball, cricket, volleyball, and football. A gym is available, and Wi-Fi is also available in a hostel. The college also provides a hospital. The canteen food is very good. Medical facilities are also provided. All types of sports and games are available.

paragraphs: The cost of pursuing an MBA at ITM University, Raipur varies depending on the specific programme chosen:

MBA/PGDM Program: The MBA/PGDM programme at ITM University, Raipur is priced at Rs 4.45 Lakhs per year. Therefore, for the full two-year duration of the program, the total cost would be Rs 8.90 Lakhs.

MBA iConnect Program: The MBA iConnect programme at ITM University, Raipur is priced slightly higher, at Rs 5.45 Lakhs per year. Thus, the total cost for the two-year duration would amount to Rs 10.90 Lakhs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I had a good experience in this college.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the oldest pharmacy colleges in Bengal, and the placement cell is good. Last year, the placement rate was 85%, which is good. For B.Pharma, the package offered is 3.9 LPA. Our college organises international seminar every 2 years, and also the faculty are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not much big, and the quality of our labs is good. Almost all the equipment and chemicals required for pharmacy practicals are present in our lab. We have a college dress uniform. The college hostels are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: CIPT AHS provides decent placements, infrastructure, and very good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good when compared to any other private pharmacy colleges. However, placements are decent here. About 60%-70% of the students get placed every year mostly in the marketing sector. But the placement rate varies every year. The average salary package offered for marketing students is Rs.16,000-22,000 per month. Overall, the college needs to improve its placement numbers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and it is neither that good nor bad. Classrooms are very good, clean and airy, and they are well-maintained. The library is also good. Most of the laboratories are good and well-equipped. However, some labs need to be well-structured. Medical facilities are not that good. Sports and games are very poor here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best private college for pharmacy in West Bengal.

content.Placements: I am very fortunate that I am a student of Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences. I am a Pharma fresher. My seniors are well placed in companies like Wipro, Cipla, TCA, etc. The highest salary package offered to one of the seniors is 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The whole premises has a free Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is one of the best places. The hostel is well cleaned, and the food served in the canteen is good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very qualified. They are very helpful, and they help us in our various projects, seminar, and journals. They teach us not as students but as a brother. Semester exams are not too difficult. If anyone goes to college every day and gain the knowledge of faculty, then they crack any exam. Our college has the best faculty members in West Bengal. There are so many students who are pursuing their PhD under the guidance of our faculty.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences.

content.Placements: Placements depend on the batch. The average salary pacakge offered ranges from 1.5 LPA - 3 LPA. The recruiting companies for the course are Medlife, Medplus, Apollo Pharmacy, Sun Pharma, Mankind, etc. All students of diploma in pharmacy students get 500 hours internships in government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: It provides free Wi-Fi, drinking mineral water, a library, laboratories, a common room, and well-equipped classrooms. There are separated hostels for boys and girls. The quality of food in the canteen is excellent. Medical facilities are also available. Different kinds of sports and games kits are also provided to the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I had a good experience in this college.

content.Placements: It is one of the oldest pharmacy colleges in Bengal, and the placement cell is good. Last year, the placement rate was 85%, which is good. For B.Pharma, the package offered is 3.9 LPA. Our college organises international seminar every 2 years, and also the faculty are good.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not much big, and the quality of our labs is good. Almost all the equipment and chemicals required for pharmacy practicals are present in our lab. We have a college dress uniform. The college hostels are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: CIPT AHS provides decent placements, infrastructure, and very good faculty.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good when compared to any other private pharmacy colleges. However, placements are decent here. About 60%-70% of the students get placed every year mostly in the marketing sector. But the placement rate varies every year. The average salary package offered for marketing students is Rs.16,000-22,000 per month. Overall, the college needs to improve its placement numbers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and it is neither that good nor bad. Classrooms are very good, clean and airy, and they are well-maintained. The library is also good. Most of the laboratories are good and well-equipped. However, some labs need to be well-structured. Medical facilities are not that good. Sports and games are very poor here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A review on Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are moderate. Recently, the placement in charge of our college was changed. So, there is a hope that they may increase. For placements, you can find many reputed pharmaceutical industries like Abbott, GlaxoSmithKline, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. Our college is covered over a large area. It is located far away from pollution and dust, and it is covered by full of green grass, trees, and flowers. Our college is situated far away from external noises. I think this is to be maintained. The buildings in our college are quite good. Overall, you can find a good environment in our college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Boys hostel in located in the campus and a separate ragging free girls hostel is also there within 1 km from the campus. Both the hostels incorporate furniture, electricity with generator back up, sufficient water and many more facilities. Every hostel is monitored under a round the clock warden.

library.description: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences has a library with a cast collection of 54487 volume of books incorporating 2071 book titles, 115 national journals, 9 international journals, magazines, periodicals, audio videos, CD ROMs, research publication and STM e-journals. The library is well equipped with spacious reading room and wifi facility. The students can visit the library catalog for various subjects through LIBSYS online service available in the library and can place their library books’ requisition through the online system too. Book bank facility is also available in the library.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Haldwani:

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to Government Medical College, Haldwani, candidate must attain the minimum cutoff required. GMC Halwani Uttarakhand NEET cutoff 2024 for admission was released for the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for round 3, where the last round closing ranks closed at 22775, for the General Home State category candidates. For the OBC AI category candidates, the round 3 cutoff was closed at 33166. For the SC Home State category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 168590, in the third round. Moreover, for the ST HS category, the GMC Haldwani cutoff 2024 released via Uttarakhand NEET was 175420. Finally, for the PWD HS and EWS HS category cutoff were closed at 1317613 and 39452, respectively.
faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get a seat at GMC Haldwani?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A good option for those who have cleared their NEET exam & are searching for a good medical college.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement provided by the college after the bond system has been removed from this college. 4 years of study and 1 year of internship are provided by the college, after which students have to apply for jobs or can set up their own clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are ample in amount. No Wi-Fi is provided to the students, but some classrooms have air conditioners equipped in them. The library is fully occupied by books from different authors. Classrooms have big projects. Also, labs are sufficiently equipped with essential apparatus. Hostel facilities are also good. The hostels are clean and peaceful, located away from the main college building, which makes it a peaceful area to live and study. The food provided in the mess is good enough compared to other colleges in the state. Also, the canteen system is within the campus, which remains open until 9:00 p.m. The rates of food in the canteen are okay. Coming to sports and games facilities in the college, the college needs to draw attention to sports and games for the students. Also, they should emphasize more on extracurricular activities for their students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely happy and satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Almost every student got placed (job) after doing MBBS. Remaining go for PG entrance exam preparation. Few lucky ones got selected in the PG entrance examination in the first attempt. My course offers opportunity to serve people. Top recruiters are hospitals, clinical or non clinical departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories in my college are well-equipped. WIFI is available in the college library. Classrooms have projectors, a green board, and cross ventilation. Facilities at our hostels are very good. The food available at the mess and canteen is of good quality, and students are quite satisfied. We have a separate sports ground and indoor sports complex with a college gym.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure with green and vast campus, and with good career opportunities, makes it best.

content.Placements: The total number of students is 125 across 28 colleges. The highest package offered is Rs. 90,000, while the lowest is Rs. 60,000, and the average is approximately Rs. 70,000. Most of the students work in the same hospital after an internship at the same college. The college offers courses like MBBS, B.Sc., Nursing, and Paramedical.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are very good, and the infrastructure is well-maintained and well-furnished. Courses and department have their separate labs, which are well-equipped. Classrooms are decent but without AC. The library is provided with AC and Wi-Fi. The hostel has good infrastructure and furniture, while the food is awful. Sports and games are organized regularly.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029

content.Placements: There is a batch of 125 students in total for batch 2024. The package offered after completion is good. The salary offered is Rs. 70,000 per month, after completion, students can continue in same college as a non-PG with a good amount of money or can join private hospital or can open their own.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and everything is well-maintained. Classrooms are good but there is no AC, biochem lab, physio lab, and anatomy DH are all well-equipped there is no lack of instruments. Hostel is also well-maintained and clean, washrooms are clean, and rooms are well-equipped. Mess food is okay and the quality of the food is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good option for those who have cleared their NEET exam & are searching for a good medical college.

content.Placements: There is no placement provided by the college after the bond system has been removed from this college. 4 years of study and 1 year of internship are provided by the college, after which students have to apply for jobs or can set up their own clinics.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are ample in amount. No Wi-Fi is provided to the students, but some classrooms have air conditioners equipped in them. The library is fully occupied by books from different authors. Classrooms have big projects. Also, labs are sufficiently equipped with essential apparatus. Hostel facilities are also good. The hostels are clean and peaceful, located away from the main college building, which makes it a peaceful area to live and study. The food provided in the mess is good enough compared to other colleges in the state. Also, the canteen system is within the campus, which remains open until 9:00 p.m. The rates of food in the canteen are okay. Coming to sports and games facilities in the college, the college needs to draw attention to sports and games for the students. Also, they should emphasize more on extracurricular activities for their students.

content.Placements: Almost every student got placed (job) after doing MBBS. Remaining go for PG entrance exam preparation. Few lucky ones got selected in the PG entrance examination in the first attempt. My course offers opportunity to serve people. Top recruiters are hospitals, clinical or non clinical departments.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories in my college are well-equipped. WIFI is available in the college library. Classrooms have projectors, a green board, and cross ventilation. We have a separate sports ground and indoor sports complex with a college gym.

description: Government Medical College, Haldwani cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Haldwani NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 10967 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Haldwani MBBS cutoff 2025 was 10967 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 14958 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Haldwani accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Haldwani NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 13754 to 140955. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Haldwani MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 13754.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing ranks varied between 94105 and .
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

The Medical Counselling Committee (MCC) will start the registration process for NEET PG Round 1 Seat Allotment from Jul 27, onwards. The MCC has released NEET PG 2023 Counselling schedule on the official website at mcc.nic.in. The last date to register/ pay the fee for NEET PG R1 Counselling is Aug 1. Government Medical College, Haldwani cutoff 2023 for MD and MS courses is based on NEET PG 2023 scores followed by NEET Counselling 2023.

Government Medical College, Haldwani accepts NEET PG scores for admission to the MD and MS courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for the General All India category students:

Uttarakhand NEET UG cutoff have been concluded for further admissions. The cutoff was concluded for candidates seeking admission to the UG course. Government Medical College, Haldwani offers MBBS course at the UG level. The cutoff for all these courses was released separately for categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas.

reviews.review_heading: Government medical college haldwani
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. The departments are maintained separately with their own buildings. Also, the departments have their own labs. All classrooms and lecture theaters are fully air-conditioned. The college also has a central library.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for MBBS but still can get better.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. We have two rooms shared for the 1st and 2nd years, and then a single room from the third year onwards. The only disadvantage is that there is no Wi-Fi connection facility in the hostel. You need to go to the library for it. Labs are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory campus and college environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is too good. The campus and administrative block are nice, with all the facilities. In our hostel, there are both single and double rooms. For first- and second-year students, there are double rooms and single rooms are available for third-year students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government medical college, Haldwani.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by this college include the mess, hostel rooms, library, etc. The infrastructure of this college is also very good and includes a sports ground, sports complex, gym, badminton court, table tennis, etc. There is a lot of greenery around in this college.

reviews.review_heading: My experience of the college life.
reviews.review_text: College provides a different hostel for each year which is free from ragging. There are 2 storey hostels for every batch of students. Each hostel has double sharing rooms with common washrooms and bathroom. Geyser is provided along with western washrooms. You can get your coolers but no refrigerators or AC are allowed. You can bring your inductions here. Each floor has its own water coolers. Food in the mess is good which you can refill multiple times. Canteen is also available in the college wh...

reviews.review_heading: The unfiltered review of Government Medical College, Haldwani, Uttarakhand .
reviews.review_text: Very well-built infrastructure is provided by the college and it also contains newly built buildings that are very beautiful and tempting. The lecture theatre and auditorium complexes are sufficiently large and can accommodate a large number of students at any given time.

reviews.review_heading: College surrounded by greenery.
reviews.review_text:
In college, only fans are there so on hot summer days, it is next to impossible to study in the classroom and the same goes for hostels. And the situation get worse when electricity is gone. A bed, a table, and a chair are provided in the hostel room. At first, it was a double-sharing room. In the 2nd year, first it is triple sharing and then it is double sharing. 
At 3 year upto internship, it is single room.

reviews.review_heading: Skilled teachers, but average facilities, and bad food.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is decent or even better than that of other medical colleges in Uttarakhand. 
Free wi-fi is available in the college library.
The labs are not very well equipped but they are decent for work. 
Food is provided by local contractors in the hostel mess. 
The facilities in the hostel are good, with a proper supply of water and electricity. 
Sports and game facilities are good .

reviews.review_heading: Well maintained and beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good and clean. Hostel rooms are big. In the 1st and 2nd years, we have to share rooms but from the 3rd year on, we get separate rooms. The quality of the food in the mess is good. There is a functional gym and sports ground. The library has free Wi-Fi and is open even on Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty and best place to study medicine in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: All the experiential and clinical labs are well furnished and have good ventilation; the classrooms are also fully ventilated and equipped with smart classes. Food is of average quality in the hostel mess but in the canteen, food is of good quality and the sports field is big and has all the sports and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is great. You will love it here. Infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms and libraries are very well maintained.
A canteen is available.
Mess is also available at an extra cost.
Sports and games are also here. The hostels and college sports academy provide sports materials and a gym is also available here for free. The gym is also maintained.

college_info.intro:
Indus University Ahmedabad has various undergraduate, postgraduate & doctorate programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Life and Basic Sciences, Agriculture, Business Management, Education, Law and Sciences & other fields. Some of prominent programs of university are BSc, BCom, BCom (Hons), BA LLB, BTech, MTech, MBA & several other programs in various specialisations including Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at Indus University. Indus University BTech programme here offers ten specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Metallurgical Engineering, Information Technology, and Mechanical Engineering. Also, the Indus University MBA programme here comes in many specialisations such as Integrated MBA, Dual Degree MBA (BBA + MBA), BBA, BCom (Honors) with ACCA UK, MBA, BBA in Aviation, and many more. Below are some of courses offered by Indus University & respective eligibility and Indus University fees:

faqs.answer: Indus University offers BSc in Clinical Research as an undergraduate honors degree lasting for four years. Clinical Research is a programme provides students with the knowledge to conduct and manage clinical research studies. BSc (Hons) in Clinical Research curriculum has first semester teaches students with the fundamentals of management sciences, while the second and third years are focused on specializing in topics related to healthcare and clinical research. Students from this programme could perform a vital role in researching the pharmacology, biochemical causes of disease and evaluating new medications and treatment techniques.With BSc in Clinical Research degree, students can pursue career as a pharmacists, clinical research investigators, clinical data managers, biostatisticians, and research on new medicates/treatments.

overview_faqs.question: How long is the course duration of MBA at Indus University?
overview_faqs.answer: The MBA curriculum is a two year long educational format inclusive of the hands on experience and in detailed knowledge about the subject. The MBA course at Indus University stresses on overall growth of the students so that they are able to prepare for the professional outlook following the 2 year academic course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indus University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: With an emphasis on academics and excellent study resources, Indus University provides MBA students with a positive educational experience. The university's facilities and faculty are first-rate. But unlike some other universities, Indus University has a smaller campus community, and job placement rates are mediocre, with a median salary of $3–4 Lacs annually. The institution offers admission based on graduation results and, in the event that there are open seats, through management quota. To choose the specialisation that best fits their objectives, prospective students should think about their hobbies and career goals.

review_summary.college_name: Indus University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students are placed. I don't know about the highest or lowest package offered. Bank of America is one of the many. Around 60–70 percent of students get internships who register themselves. Top roles I don't know, but there might be, mostly fresher-related roles.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.

content.Placements: Indus University placement is very good. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the lowest package is 7 LPA. They have the best placement in their segment. It is value for money.
content.Infrastructure: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.
content.Faculty: Indus University has the best faculty. All faculty are good, intelligent, and skilled. The exam is very good. They include theory and practice. The exam level is medium. They have the best course. They have a specialization course like AIML.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.

content.Placements: The university has established itself as one of the premier institutions, not only in terms of academic excellence but also in securing the future of its students through 100% placement assistance. The commitment towards career development is evident from the first year itself, as the training and placement cell actively guides students with skill development, personality enhancement, and industry readiness programs.
content.Infrastructure: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recreation centers, and green open space further add to the overall campus appeal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.

content.Placements: It's a nice college, and placements are really not good, but you have to know the humanity and what people need for placement, and you have to visit this college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful to us, and exams are given based on attendance. If attendance is low, then we will not be allowed to attend the exam. We also have events like playing games and mind games at the national level. People are very friendly, and the campus is so good for me.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.

content.Placements: There are so many courses in college, and all of them are taught with dedication and hard work by the teachers, along with the support of mentors. The placement records are very good. Big companies like Microsoft, Google, Apple, and many others are offering placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.
content.Faculty: Faculty of Indus tries to teach you in a very friendly nature. The teaching style is too friendly that even an average student can understand it in simple words. Most of the teachers have Ph.D. in their respective roles. The semester exams seem easy because of the teaching by the faculty.

admission_overview.title: Indus University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Indus University admission is open for the academic year 2025-2026. The university offers courses in the stream of Engineering, Management, Science, Design, etc. The popular programmes at the university are BTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, BCA, etc. Indus University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of various national-level entrance exams such as GATE, MAT, CMAT, etc. Apart from this, Indus University also conducts entrance exams such as Indus-MAT, Indus-DAT, etc. Students can apply online on the official website of the university. More details around Indus University admission 2025 are given in the following article.

paragraphs: Indus University admissions start with online registrations. Further, candidates must qualify for the respective entrance exam and fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as per the courses. Check below the detailed steps for the Indus University admission process:
Step 1: Indus University Application Process

Indus University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university for their desired programme. While filling the application form, they must submit the supporting documents of previous qualifications and pay an application fee for the respective UG & PG courses.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to Indus University is both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BDes, etc., candidates must qualify for national/ university-level entrance exams. However, the university offers direct admission to courses such as BSc, BCA, BCom, MSc, etc. For some courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the university releases the list of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIndus University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into Indus University BTech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: 50% seats of the sanctioned strength of each course is Management Quota, admission of which is handled by the institute as per guidelines of ACPC. Minimum Aggregate 45% in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics, Theory exam in H.S.C. Students must have appeared in GUJCET exam.

faqs.question: What is the role of ACPC of Indus University for admission in the BTech course?
faqs.answer: The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) is a body that handles the admission process of BTech of the Indus University. It has set guidelines for the purpose of admission to both management quota and the normal seat.

faqs.question: How to take admission in the BTech course at Indus University?
faqs.answer: For getting admission in the BTech course at Indus University, the candidates need to register themselves with the ACPC by applying and filling up the online application with the requied details. After paying the application fee, the form should be submitted. The students are selected on the basis of merit for the 50% seat reserved. The other 50% seats are available for direct admission purpose.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Indus University accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Indus University MBA admissions are entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on several national-level/ university level entrance exams. Candidates willing to get admission to MBA course at the Indus University can either qualify for CAT/ MAT/ CMAT or they can appear for Indus-MAT entrance exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at Indus University?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to get admission to MBA at Indus University must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the course before applying. To get admitted to Indus University Master of Business Administration (MBA) course, candidates must pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate in the relevant stream from a recognised board. However, candidates from reserved categories can apply with minimum 45% aggregate in the last qualifying exam of their graduation.

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. reviews.review_heading: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.
reviews.review_text: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recrea...

reviews.review_heading: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.
reviews.review_text: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the poor faculty, fake placements, and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice and well-maintained. There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and it has only limited access for official work. The library is also decent. Hostel rooms are average. Food in a mess is sometimes tasty and sometimes not. I never saw a medical room in my college, so I do not have an idea about it. Sports facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our computer science department is well-equipped with modern labs. It has high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with access to journals and e-resources. Hostel provides decent rooms with basic amenities, 24/7 water and electricity and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic with a variety of vegetarian options. Campus also includes medical facilities with a visiting doctor. It also has good good sports infrastructure including cricket, football ground and indoor games like ta...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities with active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and a good library are available. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. Mess food is average; canteens offer better variety. The medical room is active 24/7, and sports facilities like gym, playground, and courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: From campus to career: Life at Indus University
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Indus University, especially for the B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering department, is quite robust and student-friendly. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, and smart classrooms with projectors and modern seating arrangements. The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. The rooms are generally clean and furnished with basic amenities like a study table, chair, cupboard, and fans. The hostel bu...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a balanced campus life with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure, with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, with basic amenities like laundry, security, and study areas are provided. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and placement opportunities in core sectors.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available for students Wi-Fi, full AC classrooms, library, etc. Best quality hostel facilities are provided to students, and the best quality of food is available in mess and canteen. They even provide medical facilities, and all types of sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, supportive faculty, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. It offers clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and 24x7 security. The mess provides hygienic vegetarian food, and the taste is average. The canteen offers snacks and fast food. Medical care is available on campus with doctors and emergency support. Sports like cricket, football, and badminton are encouraged, with regular tournaments and well-maintained grounds for students to stay active and healthy throughout their academic life.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, the college is justifying with fee totally. It has the best return on investment so far.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and facilities are also good. There are various labs and good infrastructure for overall practicals. The library is fine not that good and not that bad. Hostel rooms are okay, but the food is very delicious at affordable rates. Apart from this, Indus University has a very good infrastructure for sports. It has a basketball court, football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech. in Cyber Security course at Indus University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like labs, canteen, and sports are pretty good. There are some negative points like there is not much place to sit around on campus during free lectures or lunch breaks. It is a small campus and the classrooms are also bearable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and it is good for study.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very huge. There are many aircraft on campus, one airplane at the campus, an entrance by helicopter, and JET planet behind the main building our parking slots are very huge. We have grounds to play activities like basketball and pickleball ground.

faqs.answer: To be eligible for the MPT course, candidates must make sure to have passed Class 12 in the Science stream with PCB (Physics, Chemistry and Biology) subjects with an aggregate of 50% marks. Also, they must have been a graduate of the BPT course. The popular entrance exams conducted for MPT courses are CUET PG, JESAS PG, etc. The average MPT course fee ranges between INR 2,000 and INR 15 Lakh.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MPT at SRM College of Physiotherapy?

faqs.answer: Yes, the SRM College of Physiotherapy is a good college for Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT). BPT offered by SRM College is a 54 months course and the seat intake is 120. The total fees for the whole course is INR 7.88 Lakhs. You can join the course in merit if you have good marks and high cutoff in your 10+2 (CBSE Or Stateboard and ISC exam). The college offers good academics as well as internship guidance to the students. The placement percentage of the college for BPT for the past year is 94%. And the top recruiters are Accenture, DBS Bank, Dell, Godrej, Google, HCL, IBM, ICICI, and ICICI Prudential. The highest salary reported so far is INR 110 Lacs per annum which is great. The median salary range is INR 6.5 LPA. So, the college offers good campus placements. Students have rated the college 4.5/5 which makes the college even more trustworthy.
faqs.question: Q: Is SRM College of Physiotherapy a good college for BPT?

faqs.answer: There is an entrance exam conducted by SRM through which you will get admission in MPT courses. Minimum 55% aggregate of marks or a CGPA of 5.5 in qualifying examination is required. The candidates must have also passed the Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) Degree or equivalent (4 years + 6 months of compulsory internship on or before 31st May of that academic year) from a UGC recognised University in India (on campus full time program).

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty and comprehensive facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department offers facilities with modern labs, well-equipped classrooms, and good wi-fi. Library is comprehensive and supports student research. reviews.review_text: Many hospitals and rehabilitation centers are looking forward to hiring students from this college. The salary packages depend on skills in particular aspects. We are so fortunate to have a seat in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, great campus, eco friendly environment, good exposure in terms of clinics.

Wi-Fi is available in every nook n corners of the college, smart classrooms are there, labs are there with well equipped machinaries. Food quality is good in hostels and also in canteens around them.

reviews.review_text: Facilities are good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also good, and the library is nice. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good, but the area around the hostel is quite bad. The quality of food available in the mess is average, but the food quality is generally amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is overall good; placements are not satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available, and there is also a library. Physiology and anatomy labs are provided, but the hostel is very expensive. All teachers are very kind, and the best faculty is offered by the college. Air-cooled classrooms are available, but the mess and canteen food are not so good.

reviews.review_heading: This is an excellent college on the basis of knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure. It has centralized air conditioning in every class and each department of the college. It is a hygienic mess. It has a well-organized library that has a variety of books by different authors. It has hostel facilities for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classes are very well furnished and have all the necessary requirements for a comfortable sitting. Labs are well developed. The library is also modern. The canteen area is also good, and the food is also nice. Some sports are also played.

reviews.review_heading: Dhanwantari Chandigarh a must or waste of money?
reviews.review_text: Good hostel, Nice good, Wi-Fi, Library was good, hostel is good single room AC cost a little higher than average but the facility is very good, Sports games and surrounding area is also good you should check it out before enrolling into this college .

reviews.review_heading: Shri Dhanwantri Ayurvedic College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course and hostel is average. The campus is well cleaned, but campus life is small, with insufficient space for sports and extracurricular activities. The hostel is also a well-kept place, but the food is the worst in taste and very poor in quality.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are the best with the well-developed structure. There are proper classrooms. Labs have all the things and instruments. It has a modern library. Hostel facilities are very good and serve good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Dhanwantry Ayurvedic College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are good. We have a good canteen. The hostel facility is not available in our college. They follow attendance rules very strictly. Our college location is good. The hospital has OPD. Many ayurvedic departments are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and good environment.
reviews.review_text: College has a fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi campus. All the labs are well designed and the classrooms are newly designed.

college_info.college_name: Hi-Tech College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Hi-Tech College of Pharmacy admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

review_content.Placements: 20% of students were placed in our course. INR 75,000 was the highest package, INR 15,000 was the lowest, and INR 25,000 was the average package offered in your course. The top requirement for our course is a well-versed student. 90% of students got internships through our course and in hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of the infrastructure is very good. All facilities in our course are available. All facilities in our hostel are available. All medical facilities are available. Canteen foods are good for health. All sports events are organized by management.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Average facility not good also not bad.

review_content.Placements: Student first appear OJEE (Odisha joint entrance exam) then according to other rank then he or she will taking admission in the college. The package will depend upon the company. There are many company will offer to the B.Pharma students. Internship will held for 40 days according to the students demands.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab and class room were in average condition and there are many classrooms are available Well and good management. There are many student are taking admission in this college And also good and well condition hostel rooms are available and alsi AC room are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2018. The infrastructure is great.

review_content.Placements: 1. Above 90% of the students got jobs through the placement drive. 2. 100000 is the salary package offered to the students. 3. All medicine manufacturing companies come to the college to hire students. 4. Compounder is the role offered. 5. 125000 is the package offered in my course. 6. All students got good job offers in reputed companies
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is Wi-Fi in labs. There is a MatLab. The classrooms are well designed. The library is very big. The hostel facility is very good as there is a separate hostel for boys and girls. The hostels are very good.

review_summary.college_name: Hi-Tech College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities at the college.

content.Placements: 90% of students got internships through our course. The college has its own college hospital, Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital in Bhubaneswar, where we can go for training sessions during a specific semester. Many top companies visit for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. We have separate classrooms for each semester, and there is a lab for every subject. The library is well-equipped, where we can borrow books for exam preparation. The college also organizes sports events, annual functions, and fresher’s parties. There are two canteens available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is really good for studying.

content.Placements: 20% of students were placed in our course. INR 75,000 was the highest package, INR 15,000 was the lowest, and INR 25,000 was the average package offered in your course. The top requirement for our course is a well-versed student. 90% of students got internships through our course and in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the infrastructure is very good. All facilities in our course are available. All facilities in our hostel are available. All medical facilities are available. Canteen foods are good for health. All sports events are organized by management.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average facility not good also not bad.

content.Placements: Student first appear OJEE (Odisha joint entrance exam) then according to other rank then he or she will taking admission in the college. The package will depend upon the company. There are many company will offer to the B.Pharma students. Internship will held for 40 days according to the students demands.
content.Infrastructure: Lab and class room were in average condition and there are many classrooms are available Well and good management. There are many student are taking admission in this college And also good and well condition hostel rooms are available and alsi AC room are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2018. The infrastructure is great.

content.Placements: 1. Above 90% of the students got jobs through the placement drive. 2. 100000 is the salary package offered to the students. 3. All medicine manufacturing companies come to the college to hire students. 4. Compounder is the role offered. 5. 125000 is the package offered in my course. 6. All students got good job offers in reputed companies
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is Wi-Fi in labs. There is a MatLab. The classrooms are well designed. The library is very big. The hostel facility is very good as there is a separate hostel for boys and girls. The hostels are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average placement but good campus life.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students get placed. The average package is 2.5 LPA. The highest is about 4.5 LPA. 60% of students get internships in companies placed in Hyderabad and other big cities. Research fields are open for you if you have high knowledge and interest. All other opportunities, like pharma management and health care management, are also available.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The hostel rooms and washrooms are very nice. Canteen food is average. Labs are average and lack high end equipment. Medical facilities in the hospital are very good for students. Registration fees are free, and basic things are very affordable. Campus life is good. Sports facilities are average.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied, this is heaven.

review_content.Placements: Students take entrance exams and do Postgraduation, almost everyone. And eventually, everyone gets settled. We have a compulsory 1-year internship at our hospital as a part of our course, so everyone should complete that. You are completely qualified to Practice as a doctor once you finish.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is well-equipped with all sorts of books, journals and e-library is also there. Infrastructure is really nice and our classes accommodate 150 students.
