admission_process.title: Government Kilpauk Medical College, Chennai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Government Kilpauk Medical College,Chennai admissionsare completely entrance-based. The college offers courses across various specialisations. Government Kilpauk Medical College,Chennai admission is done based on scores of exams like NEET UG and NEET PG, The admission process is completely online.
Candidates canc heck below the admission process atGovernment Kilpauk Medical College,Chennai:
Application Process

Candidates wanting to take admission in UG and PG courses at Government Kilpauk Medical College,Chennai have to appear for the NEET UG/PG/SS exam depending on the course. Fill the NEET application form on the official website of NTA.
Counselling and Selection Process

Candidates who clear the NEET cutoff as set by the college, will be eligible to apply for counselling. For MBBS, 85% of the seats are reserved for Tamil Nadu candidates under state quota and 15% fall under AIl India quota. For PG courses 50% seats are reserved for state quota. Counselling takes place in two rounds followed by mop-ip round and stray round.
Document Check and Seat Allocation
Candidates are allocated seats based on their performance in NEET exam and counselling rounds. Aspirants have to get their documents verified and pay the course fee to confirm admission.

Government Kilpauk Medical College,Chennai feehas various components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Students who get selected have to pay admission fee as the final step for seat confirmation. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., B.A.M.S. and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MD and MS. Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Colleges are very good for students. That's why students get a good education from college.

review_content.Placements: 90% students are going to a good company and a hub. In my college, the highest package is above 1.39 cr, and the lowest is 8.9 LPA. Many companies are interested in my course, and 89% are internships in low forms. Mout court is in charge, and they have a dream job from the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my course, many facilities are available, like digital learning and digital libraries, and are covered with high-quality Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also very good. In the hostel, anytime support for wardan and hospital emergency, and the college is also a family. Mess is very clear and good hostels have facilities to play games and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the course that I am pursuing in my college.

review_content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students get placed just after completing their degree. Other options are we can crack the AIAPGET exam for a PG course that will help us earn more. Big pharmaceutical companies offer jobs for students. All students who passed their final year exam get the opportunity to do internships at their respective colleges with a decent stipend. The surgery course has the best possible salary we can expect in this profession.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college was established in 1946, so as expected, it has that old building. However, classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available, and for special video lectures, we have a projector installed in every classroom. The college also has library facilities where students can take their important books for better studies. The hostel is the same as the college building, like an old type. Food is provided by the hostel mess at very affordable rates. It serves good quality food. It is a medical college, so there is no doubt about medical facilities. Sports and games are organised here.

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good institute of the city.

content.Placements: There are many students in the college, but more of the students are in the arts stream. 3 years of the Bachelor's degree. I have completed my studies in the subjects of history, English, and Hindi. After 3 years, you can complete your internship. After getting the degree, you can continue a master degree.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities on the campus. And all the services provided by the college are the best. The college department is very gentle. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, Science lab, computer lab, playground, NCC, classroom, off-course, and a big library.

individual_reviews.course: BUMS - Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college, but if there is a hostel, this is the best one.

content.Placements: 90% of students are employed. The highest salary is 1 LPA and the lowest is Rs. 30,000 per month. SMS hospital is our the highest hospital, as I know some students are in SMS hospital and the rest are in their district hospital. The top role in this course is senior medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not too much, but average. We have a physiology lab and anatomy lab, a decent classroom, and a good library. There is a negative point, our college doesn't have a hostel, but we think there must be a good hostel in the future. Overall, there are decent types of facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Colleges are very good for students. That's why students get a good education from college.

content.Placements: 90% students are going to a good company and a hub. In my college, the highest package is above 1.39 cr, and the lowest is 8.9 LPA. Many companies are interested in my course, and 89% are internships in low forms. Mout court is in charge, and they have a dream job from the company.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, many facilities are available, like digital learning and digital libraries, and are covered with high-quality Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also very good. In the hostel, anytime support for wardan and hospital emergency, and the college is also a family. Mess is very clear and good hostels have facilities to play games and many more.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the course that I am pursuing in my college.

content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students get placed just after completing their degree. Other options are we can crack the AIAPGET exam for a PG course that will help us earn more. Big pharmaceutical companies offer jobs for students. All students who passed their final year exam get the opportunity to do internships at their respective colleges with a decent stipend. The surgery course has the best possible salary we can expect in this profession.
content.Infrastructure: My college was established in 1946, so as expected, it has that old building. However, classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available, and for special video lectures, we have a projector installed in every classroom. The college also has library facilities where students can take their important books for better studies. The hostel is the same as the college building, like an old type. Food is provided by the hostel mess at very affordable rates. It serves good quality food. It is a medical college, so there is no doubt about medical facilities. Sports and games are organised here.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college has good faculty, placement, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: After MBBS, 20% of students join B.A.M.S. The lowest package is 2 LPA, while the highest depends on the doctor’s skills. Government hospitals recruit students. 100% of students receive scholarships. Traditional medicine is becoming popular again, and its scope is increasing day by day.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average, not so good and not so bad, and in my opinion, both will improve in the future. The hostel is not present at present but may be budgeted for in some months. A canteen facility is present. Sports and games are present, both average.

reviews.review_heading: All were good and gave support.
reviews.review_text: The library and every classroom are big, and some rooms have projectors. Labs are available for blood testing and naturopathic treatments. Overall, the college campus is good. There are good and very nice facilities are available outside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swasthya Kalyan Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 24 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Swasthya Kalyan - A review report.
reviews.review_text: There are projectors in every classroom along with mics and speakers for teachers. It has exhaust fans in classrooms and Wi-Fi facility. Hostel is also 1 KM away from college. We have mess and canteen. Vegetarian and Indian food is prepared there for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 12 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for enjoying purposes. You can join this college at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: The campus has some facilities like airy classrooms, labs, a library, a canteen which is mostly close, and Wi-Fi on campus. There are no books in the library. There are no clean bathrooms. The quality of the food is the worst ever. There is hot water with sugar and colour.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Rajasthan Unani Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 7 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel but provides good equipment for sports. Medical facilities are excellent, and Wi-Fi facility is not provided by the college. Classrooms, etc., are very good and clean, and the infrastructure is nice but has to be improved much more.

reviews.review_heading: Studies are good quality, location is bit odd, infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: We have all types of labs for every subject. The anatomical lab is well-equipped with bones and structures, the physiology lab has every test material, and the pharmacy lab has all related equipment. Other labs like pathology, PSM, and organon labs are also well-maintained. Talking about the hostel facilities, it is a very good place to live, the food is good, and all other amenities are available. Grounds are provided for sports, and equipment for other games is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by National Institute of AyurvedaReviewed on 12 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good choice for students who want to pursue B.A.M.S.
reviews.review_text: It has decent infrastructure, experienced and well-qualified faculty, and a well-stocked library and laboratory. The only problem is that students don't get hostel accommodation in the 1st year and also face difficulty in the 2nd year to get a hostel. The hostels are good with all facilities, but you have to stay outside in a PG or flat for approximately 2 years before being able to get a seat in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of its campus, teaching faculty, events, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Each classroom has A.C., digital facilities, as well as blackboards along with Wi-Fi. Subjects like anatomy, physiology, and other department-related subjects have their own labs. In my hostel, there are attached washrooms with geysers. The college conducts sports events along with cultural programs every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the university is great, whether it comes to infrastructure or the environment.
reviews.review_text: Always the best, girls and boys have separate hostels. The library has Wi-Fi and magazines. Medical facilities are the best, and even an ATM and bank are available within the university. So a person can fulfill their basic requirements within the university.

reviews.review_heading: Only government Ayurvedic university in Rajasthan, all colleges are under this university.
reviews.review_text: Food is okay, the hostel is good, and overall, the infrastructure is good. The hostel campus is very big, and everything is good. College is very strict with attendance, so maintain your attendance. Overall, the course is good, and the faculty is also good and supportive.

review_summary.college_name: Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Creating exuberant technical professionals.

content.Placements: A minimum of 40% of students in my course secured placements. Their packages are valuable and worthy. Companies like Tata, JSW, and Indian Railways, along with many others, are actively recruiting mechanical engineers. The top roles offered are in the merchant navy, marine engineering, design engineering, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: My college infrastructure is well-finished, and their labs and library also have a good interior. There are facilities of Wi-Fi in the library, canteen, and labs. There is indoor gaming, a courtyard, a backyard, and a gym. There is also a volleyball court and a badminton court in college. Medical teams and doctors are hired, and a counseling team is also hired. There is also a girls' common room in engineering, pharmacy, and architecture.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college have amazing mentors to guide through your journey.

content.Placements: The percentage of students being accepted is around 25%, the highest package being 3 lakhs per annum. Getting the role above manager was given. The companies usually come in here at are industry level and they have various interviews for the intake. The lowest package given was around 50k per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are perfect for learning; they do lack air conditioning. Library have amazing range of books related to fields and have Wi-Fi on every floor for usage got children related to academic purpose. Hostels are provided for the children by the college and the food quality and living quality are quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: To choose the best for career development, choose Kalsekar.

content.Placements: As a first-year engineering student at AIKTC, it was my amazing experience towards the placement records. The college till now had amazing placement records with the highest package of 10 LPA and the average package of 2 LPA. The faculty truly supports and encourages the students during placements.
content.Infrastructure: AIKTC is developing day by day, and it seems that in the next 2 years, the college hostel will also be prepared. The college has amazing infrastructure and facilities. All the labs, classrooms, administration lounge, etc., are regularly cleaned.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the staff were good, the canteen is amazing, and the environment is excellent.

content.Placements: Fifty people were placed with salaries ranging from 10,000 to 200,000. Companies like Godrej and Tata were among the recruiters. Most students, around 60%, did internships in automobile companies. It’s a good college where you’ll love to be; everything is amazing, featuring a big courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostels, but everything else is good. The college has a large courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens, creating a pleasant environment.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is average; we don't learn much until after placement. It can be quite challenging, but overall, the college environment is enjoyable, with great facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty support, good infrastructure, facilities etc.

content.Placements: AIKTC provides excellent placement opportunities with top companies visiting the campus for recruitments. For those seeking internships, the college offers robust support and guidance. Eligibility criteria for placements typically include a minimum GPA and successful completion of relevant course. The highest package offered was 7.5 LPA. A significant percentage of students secured placements.
content.Infrastructure: What stands out most about Kalsekar Technical Campus is its exceptional faculty and vibrant campus life. The faculty is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely invested in the students success. As for campus life, it’s a dynamic environment where every day offers new opportunities to engage, learn, and grow.

reviews.review_heading: Creating exuberant technical professionals.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is well-finished, and their labs and library also have a good interior. There are facilities of Wi-Fi in the library, canteen, and labs. There is indoor gaming, a courtyard, a backyard, and a gym. There is also a volleyball court and a badminton court in college. Medical teams and doctors are hired, and a counseling team is also hired. There is also a girls' common room in engineering, pharmacy, and architecture.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college have amazing mentors to guide through your journey.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are perfect for learning; they do lack air conditioning. Library have amazing range of books related to fields and have Wi-Fi on every floor for usage got children related to academic purpose. Hostels are provided for the children by the college and the food quality and living quality are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: To choose the best for career development, choose Kalsekar.
reviews.review_text: AIKTC is developing day by day, and it seems that in the next 2 years, the college hostel will also be prepared. The college has amazing infrastructure and facilities. All the labs, classrooms, administration lounge, etc., are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: All the staff were good, the canteen is amazing, and the environment is excellent.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels, but everything else is good. The college has a large courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens, creating a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty support, good infrastructure, facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: What stands out most about Kalsekar Technical Campus is its exceptional faculty and vibrant campus life. The faculty is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely invested in the students success. As for campus life, it’s a dynamic environment where every day offers new opportunities to engage, learn, and grow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. There is no hostel in our college. Labs are not updated. There are many shops and restaurants near our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a separate lab for every subject, such as EM lab, EP lab, BEE lab, and maths tutorial lab. The library and canteen are the best on campus. The library is free for everyone. It offers discussion rooms, study rooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a training ground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was the best. Library and labs were the best. Classrooms were good but more lighting should be provided. Medical facility was good but it was available on alternate days.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities are excellent. Teachers provide excellent help. It's a good college all around.
reviews.review_text: Here, relatively high-quality infrastructure is offered. It was constructed recently, in or around 2011. The tools and computers in labs are well-designed and functional. Additionally, classrooms are excellent and each one has a projector. You won't have many chances to participate in sports and games; only the annual festival. The meal is inexpensive and available, despite the good mess.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college .
reviews.review_text: It doesn't have a hostel facility, but you can search for a private hostel near the college premises. But the food in the college canteen is very good; personally, my favorite is the coffee from the canteen. I have taken admission in computer engineering, and the labs here are fantastic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and the return on investment is better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our campus has 10.5 acres of land. Laboratories are excellent. It also provides a library where several books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely helping faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very beautiful. Labs, classrooms, and library are well maintained. The campus has been made or we can say developed in a well-structured manner. Students get attracted to the campus. The hostel is under development now it can be developed in some months from now.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and infrastructure of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has a large central library filled with many books. Digital laboratories are Wi-Fi enabled. There are two canteens available in the college. One canteen is open and the other canteen is closed. Sports are also available. For the computer engineering course, the campus provides a separate floor for programming.

reviews.review_heading: My thoughts about Kalsekar.
reviews.review_text: Kalsekar has a very good infrastructure. I have liked the campus since day one. It has great classrooms, laboratories, auditorium, canteen, etc. The surroundings are always clean and hygienic. They provide good and affordable meals for students. But one drawback is that there is no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: Study here and try to crack off campus placements .
reviews.review_text: Here the infrastructure is awesome, the teaching facilities are also well formed. One to one computer for every student with AC lab and the only thing in the campus I like is canteen and amazing delicious food is in canteen. The seating place and tables are clean and good quality of food is available .

The university boasts a placement percentage above 90% for MBA students, indicating a high success rate in securing placements. Companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL, Cipla, Amul, Nestle, Airtel, and Jindal Steel and Power are among the top recruiters that visit the campus for MBA placements. With the highest package reaching up to 25 LPA and an avera
faqs.question: How is Kalinga University for MBA in terms of placements?

faqs.answer: A:    In Kalinga University placements 2023, more than 350 companies participated in the placement drive. The top recruiting companies that offered students of Kalinga University placement opportunities include TOI, HDFC Bank, Karvy, Tech Mahindra, NTPC, Ultra Tech Cement, Patanjali, LG, Decathlon, etc. The median package for students during Kalinga University placements 2023 ranged from Rs 3.10 LPA to Rs 5.85 LPA In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more

faqs.answer: A:    While applying for the Kalinga University BCom courses, candidates must apply for the Kalinga Scholastic Entrance Examination (KALSEE). Candidates are required to pay the KALSEE 2024 application fee in online mode via credit card/debit card/internet banking. The KALSEE application fee varies across the UG and PG courses. The university conducts it's own entrance exam KALSEE (kalinga Scholastic entrance exam) for admission in various courses, and the number of seats in B.Sc depends on various factors such as how many students has applied for the B.Sc programme and it may vary time to time and depends on some factors such as  vailabilityof seats, eligibility criteria, and the number of applicant's actions received by the university in that year .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Campus, faculty, and life – my real experience at Kalinga.

review_content.Placements: Placements for B. Pharmacy are average at Kalinga University. Some companies visit for campus recruitment, but students mostly need to apply off-campus as well. The university provides guidance for internships and job opportunities, but students should also focus on building skills and networking on their own to get better placement offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the B. Pharmacy course at Kalinga University is decent but could be improved. Labs have the basic equipment required for practicals, and classes usually have proper seating and projectors. The hostel facilities are average, and the rooms are manageable but can be better maintained. Basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water supply, and mess are available, but sometimes need improvements. Overall, the infrastructure is okay for studies and the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Sep 2024) - B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty and modern campus, but placements need improvement.

review_content.Placements: I’m currently in the 2nd year of B.Tech Computer Science (BTCS) at Kalinga University, Raipur. I’m sharing my honest view about placements here so far, based on what seniors and faculty have told us. The college has a decent placement cell. They organize sessions on aptitude, coding, resume building, and soft skills from the 3rd year onwards. Seniors told me that companies like TCS, Wipro, HCL, and some local startups do visit the campus. Most of the packages are between 2.5 and 4 LPA, depending on your skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Kalinga University is modern and well-maintained, with smart classrooms, computer labs, a central library, and Wi-Fi across campus. The campus is spacious and green. Hostels are decent with 24/7 security, basic furniture, and attached washrooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. There’s a common room, laundry, and medical facilities. Overall, hostel life is comfortable for students.

faqs.answer: Yes, Kalings University offers BPharma Practice for working professionals. BPharma Practice is especially designed for the candidates who has an work experience in the field of medecine. The programme is two years certificate course which adds qualification to be entered in the register of pharmacists. Candidates must be a registered Pharmacist and must have a minimum of four years of pharmacy practice experience in a community or hospital pharmacy.
faqs.question: Q: Does Kalinga University offers BPharma for working professionals?

faqs.answer: Kalinga Scholastic Entrance Examination (KALSEE) is conduted to provide admission to Kalinga University's offered programme. KALSEE exam pattern question papers for UG and PG courses contain total 90 objective-type multiple-choice questions (MCQs) that candidates need to attempt in 90 minutes. The exam is conducted in online mode as a computer-based test. Questions in the KALSEE exam are asked from four sections as explained the in the tables below:Section and SubjectsQuestionsMarksSection: A – English Communication2525Section: B – Logical Reasoning2525Section: C – Quantitative Aptitude2020Section: D – General Aptitude2020Total9090
faqs.question: Q: What is the Kalinga University KALSEE exam pattern for the BSc?

faqs.answer: Minimum eligibility criteria for UG & PG Courses: For admissions to UG programmes at KU, students must have passed Class 12 and should have secured a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for SC/ST). Aspirants will be considered for PG programmes at KU if they have completed their graduation (graduation with three-year duration) with a minimum of 45% aggregate. Students belonging to SC and ST category will need a minimum of 40% for admissions. Students aiming for admissions to integrated programmes should have passed Class 12. Note: Aspirants are advised to thoroughly go through the eligibility criteria as mentioned by Kalinga University for the course in which they wish to secure admission. Please see : https://www.shiksha.com/university/kalinga-university-raipur-43004/admission#admission.
faqs.question: Q: How to get admission in Kalinga University?

faqs.answer: Yes, Kalinga University is an NAAC-accredited university. The National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) has granted a B+ to the university based on the institution’s overall quality and performance. Other than that, Kalinga University is among the 8th Private Universities in the country approved under Section 12B by UGC- University Grants Commission.NAAC is an autonomous body established by the University Grants Commission (UGC) of India to assess and accredit higher education institutions in the country. The accreditation process evaluates various aspects of an institution, including its infrastructure, teaching-learning processes, research output, governance, and overall quality. The accreditation by NAAC signifies that Ramanujan College meets certain quality standards and is recognised for its academic excellence.
faqs.question: Q: Is Kalinga University, Raipur (CG) an NAAC-accredited university?

overview_faqs.question: Does Kalinga University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: In accordance with its stated refund policy, Kalinga University does certainly provide refunds for charges. The University Grants Commission's (UGC) pointers are in keeping with this coverage. It is recommended that scholars familiarize themselves with the right terms and situations particular within the college's refund coverage with the intention to understand the requirements for eligibility, any relevant prices, and the process for asking for a refund. To ensure a continuing refund process, it is vital to fulfill the deadlines and post the desired office work.

overview_faqs.question: Does Kalinga University offers BPharma for working professionals?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Kalings University offers BPharma Practice for working professionals. BPharma Practice is especially designed for the candidates who has an work experience in the field of medecine. The programme is two years certificate course which adds qualification to be entered in the register of pharmacists. Candidates must be a registered Pharmacist and must have a minimum of four years of pharmacy practice experience in a community or hospital pharmacy.

review_summary.college_name: Kalinga University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best University for education.

content.Placements: Kalinga University is the best University in Raipur, known for its quality education and placement records. The University placement cell has highly qualified and experienced faculty. The University placement cell conducts training, i.e., they take mock interviews, mock tests, etc., so that students perform well in their placement drive. Approximately 95 percent of students get placed in the on-campus placement drive. The highest package is 30 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The University is NAAC accredited with an A+ grade and is ranked in the 200-250 band by NIRF in 2021. The University has a large library, a central Instrumentation Facility with advanced apparatus, and an Innovation and Incubation Cell to support startups. The University conducts many events like sports events, cultural fests, and many more. Facilities provided for the hosteler are quite good. The quality of mess food is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good college. Faculty members are very good at helping everyone.

content.Placements: Placements are average. If you are a skilled student, then you will get easily placed in an off-campus placement. Many students here are preparing for a government exam like GATE, CAT, and the UPSC exam. The environment of this college is quite good for studying. Placement is good.
content.Infrastructure: My overall experience with campus life at college has been very enriching, both academically and socially. The college organizes an annual cultural and technical festival. The library is well-stocked with a wide range of books. The rooms are well cleaned, and the food is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus, faculty, and life – my real experience at Kalinga.

content.Placements: Placements for B. Pharmacy are average at Kalinga University. Some companies visit for campus recruitment, but students mostly need to apply off-campus as well. The university provides guidance for internships and job opportunities, but students should also focus on building skills and networking on their own to get better placement offers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the B. Pharmacy course at Kalinga University is decent but could be improved. Labs have the basic equipment required for practicals, and classes usually have proper seating and projectors. The hostel facilities are average, and the rooms are manageable but can be better maintained. Basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water supply, and mess are available, but sometimes need improvements. Overall, the infrastructure is okay for studies and the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2024) - B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty and modern campus, but placements need improvement.

content.Placements: I’m currently in the 2nd year of B.Tech Computer Science (BTCS) at Kalinga University, Raipur. I’m sharing my honest view about placements here so far, based on what seniors and faculty have told us. The college has a decent placement cell. They organize sessions on aptitude, coding, resume building, and soft skills from the 3rd year onwards. Seniors told me that companies like TCS, Wipro, HCL, and some local startups do visit the campus. Most of the packages are between 2.5 and 4 LPA, depending on your skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Kalinga University is modern and well-maintained, with smart classrooms, computer labs, a central library, and Wi-Fi across campus. The campus is spacious and green. Hostels are decent with 24/7 security, basic furniture, and attached washrooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. There’s a common room, laundry, and medical facilities. Overall, hostel life is comfortable for students.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2024) - B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. Worth it.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students were placed last year in top companies. The highest placement salary was 12 LPA while the lowest was 3 LPA. The average salary was 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Infosys Accenture and others. 70 percent of students from my course received internships at leading tech companies like Google.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at the institution is quite good featuring a large library and a spacious sports complex on campus along with widespread Wi Fi availability throughout the campus and hostel. Our hostel rooms are quite spacious and equipped with a full Wi Fi connection and CCTV for security.

admission_overview.college_name: Kalinga University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Dates, Cutoff

paragraphs: Kalinga University admission process 2025isentrance-basedfor UG and PG courses.Kalinga Universityoffers UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes in the fields ofTechnology, Management, Arts, Science, Humanities, Pharmacy, Law, Education, etc. Further, the university offersBSc,BA,BTech, BPharma,MCA, MBA, andPGDCAetc.

For UG courses admission, candidates must have passed Class 12 and, appear forKalinga Scholastic Entrance Exam(KALSEE). Kalinga UniversityMBA admissionrequires to appear for Kalinga Management Aptitude Test(KAL-MAT)- 2025-25.

Kalinga University courses are offered undereight facultiesincludingCommerce & Management,Technology,Information Technology, Science, Arts & Humanities etc. All the degree courses offered by Kalinga University are recognised by the UGC. In addition, its Engineering, Law, Education and Pharmacy programmes are approved by AICTE, BCI, NCTE and PCI, respectively.

faqs.question: How to get admission in Kalinga University?
faqs.answer: Minimum eligibility criteria for UG & PG Courses: For admissions to UG programmes at KU, students must have passed Class 12 and should have secured a minimum of 45% aggregate  (40% for SC/ST). Aspirants will be considered for PG programmes at KU if they have completed their graduation (graduation with three-year duration) with a minimum of 45% aggregate.Students belonging to SC and ST category will need a minimum of 40% for admissions. Students aiming for admissions to integrated programmes should have passed Class 12.Note: Aspirants are advised to thoroughly go through the eligibility criteria as mentioned by Kalinga University for the course in which they wish to secure admission. Please see : https://www.shiksha.com/university/kalinga-university-raipur-43004/admission#admission.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Kalinga University?

MBA admission requires to appear for Kalinga Management Aptitude Test (KAL-MAT).Application:Candidates must apply on the official website of Kalinga University.Pay the Fee:Selected students will have to deposit the fee within ten- working days after the declaration of the qualified candidate’s list.

faqs.question: What is the Kalinga University KALSEE exam pattern for the BSc?
faqs.answer: Kalinga Scholastic Entrance Examination (KALSEE) is conduted to provide admission to Kalinga University's offered programme.KALSEE exam patternquestion papers for UG and PG courses contain total 90 objective-type multiple-choice questions (MCQs) that candidates need to attempt in 90 minutes. placement_data.title: Kalinga University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Kalinga University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.6 LPA , INR 5.85 LPA and INR 4.51 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at I NR 3.1 LPA and INR 5.85 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, as per the NIRF report 2023, 475 UG and 426 PG students were placed during Kalinga University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG students ranged between INR 2.5 LPA and INR 4.2 LPA, respectively. For PG (1-year) and PG (2-year) courses , the median package stood at INR 2.55 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA , respectively.

tables.context: Does Kalinga University have good placements?

faqs.question: Does Kalinga University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Kalinga University offers decent placements for its UG, PG, and Diploma programme. As per the report, 475 UG and 426 PG students were placed during Kalinga University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG students ranged between INR 2.5 LPA and INR 4.2 LPA, respectively. For PG (1-year) and PG (2-year) courses , the median package stood at INR 2.55 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA , respectively. The key highlights of Kalinga University Raipur UG placements 2021 are presented below: UG (3-year) Particulars Statistics (2021) Total students 162 No. of students placed 151 Placement rate 93% Median package INR 2.7 LPA UG (4-year) Particulars Statistics (2021) Total students 284 No. of students placed 186 Placement rate 65% Median package INR 3.7 LPA UG (5-year) Particulars Statistics (2021) Total students 101 No. of students placed 68 Placement rate 67% Median package INR 3.4 LPA Note: The above-mentioned data are gathered from Kalinga University NIRF report 2022.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Kalinga University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: In Kalinga University placements 2023, more than 350 companies participated in the placement drive. The top recruiting companies that offered students of Kalinga University placement opportunities include TOI, HDFC Bank, Karvy, Tech Mahindra, NTPC, Ultra Tech Cement, Patanjali, LG, Decathlon, etc. The median package for students during Kalinga University placements 2023 ranged from Rs 3.10 LPA to Rs 5.85 LPA In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more

faqs.question: What is the career prospect after BCom from Kalinga University?
faqs.answer: Kalinga University BCom curriculum provides students with the knowledge and capability to understand the business world and its complexities. The syllabus also helps students develop the ability and competence to solve issues related to the business world . After completing a BCom degree candidates can pursue their career in the field of Business such as Financial analyst, Company secretary, Certified Management Accountant (CMA), Chartered accountant, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best University for education.
reviews.review_text: The University is NAAC accredited with an A+ grade and is ranked in the 200-250 band by NIRF in 2021. The University has a large library, a central Instrumentation Facility with advanced apparatus, and an Innovation and Incubation Cell to support startups. The University conducts many events like sports events, cultural fests, and many more. Facilities provided for the hosteler are quite good. The quality of mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Faculty members are very good at helping everyone.
reviews.review_text: My overall experience with campus life at college has been very enriching, both academically and socially. The college organizes an annual cultural and technical festival. The library is well-stocked with a wide range of books. The rooms are well cleaned, and the food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Campus, faculty, and life – my real experience at Kalinga.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the B. Pharmacy course at Kalinga University is decent but could be improved. Labs have the basic equipment required for practicals, and classes usually have proper seating and projectors. The hostel facilities are average, and the rooms are manageable but can be better maintained. Basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water supply, and mess are available, but sometimes need improvements. Overall, the infrastructure is okay for studies and the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and modern campus, but placements need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Kalinga University is modern and well-maintained, with smart classrooms, computer labs, a central library, and Wi-Fi across campus. The campus is spacious and green. Hostels are decent with 24/7 security, basic furniture, and attached washrooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. There’s a common room, laundry, and medical facilities. Overall, hostel life is comfortable for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. Worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at the institution is quite good featuring a large library and a spacious sports complex on campus along with widespread Wi Fi availability throughout the campus and hostel. Our hostel rooms are quite spacious and equipped with a full Wi Fi connection and CCTV for security.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with a good campus and learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The university has good infrastructure with clean classrooms, labs, library and basic facilities. I am not a hosteler but the canteen food is good and hygienic. All basic facilities are available and so far I have not faced any major issues. We have a forensic lab where we do practical we have done so many practicals in forensic science indoors outdoor and many more.

reviews.review_heading: India's one of the cleanest and purified environmental colleges with special facilities.
reviews.review_text: With the vibrant environment, including up to five floor hostels of both boys and girls, with free 5G Wi-Fi in each room with a speed connection of 12 Kbps, and can be used by 12 devices efficiently at a time. If I talk about the mess, it's wonderful, including vegetarian and non-vegetarian food categories.

reviews.review_heading: A pretty cool college, you can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure, both are quite satisfactory. Library is well maintained with a lot of books. Classrooms don't have SMART projectors and the Wi-Fi is available for the staff only. I don't know much about the hostel but as my friends told, the food in the mess is not that good, it's average. Medical facilities are there, and college has its hospital where students get a 5% discount. Sports and athletics are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: It’s good, but not that much.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure both are quite satisfactory. The library is well-maintained with a lot of books. Classrooms do not have smart projectors, and Wi-Fi facility is available only for the staff. I don't know much about the hostel, but as my friends told me, the food in the mess is not that good, it's average. The medical facilities are there, and the college has its own hospital where students get a 5% discount. Sports and athletics facilities are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good and it is a definitely yes to take in admission.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the best infrastructure you can dream of. It has the biggest library including every book. The campus has Wi-Fi everywhere. Classes are air-conditioned. There is a canteen too. If you don't want to eat in canteen, there are multiple shops to eat in.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the good infrastructure, faculty members, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our university has a free Wi-Fi campus. It has different labs according to subjects like a computer lab, biotechnology lab, chemistry lab, Zoology lab, etc. We also have a library facility. There are a thousand books inside the library on different shelves according to subject.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kalinga University.
reviews.review_text: KU boasts a well-developed infrastructure with modern facilities including fully Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms equipped with projectors and well-stocked labs. The library has a vast collection of books and digital resources. KU has I think best hostel facilities as compared to other private colleges including 24x7 Wi-Fi, medical facilities, spacious halls, and ample rooms. KU has 3 spacious hall messes to accommodate a large no of students at a time. It is managed by the institution itself, to serve ...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive teachers, and great opportunities for business and sports.
reviews.review_text: Kalinga University offers excellent facilities for students, enhancing their learning experience with various value-added courses and engaging activities. University provides top-notch hostel accommodation with modern amenities, including a gym, Wi-Fi across the entire campus, air-conditioned classrooms, and a well-equipped library with a computer lab. The food quality is outstanding, and students also have access to a canteen. Additionally, the university supports sports enthusiasts through adm...

reviews.review_heading: My Experience at Kalinga University.
reviews.review_text: Kalinga University has a wide range of facilities and infrastructure like smart classrooms, laboratories, auditoriums, seminar rooms, cafeterias, and a sports complex. The university has well-equipped medical facilities, a huge sports complex, and also has a canteen and mess that serves healthy and nutritious meals.

reviews.review_heading: My Kalinga University review.
reviews.review_text: College conducts many events every year like a fresher party, technical events, sports events, Garba night, etc., so that students can enjoy their college life. Campus is very big with a lot of greenery inside the campus. Inside campus, there are a lot of facilities provided for students like 24/7 Wi-Fi, a cafeteria, canteen, big playground area, indoor sports, etc. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained and well-furnished. Facilities provided for the hosteler are quite good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Kalinga University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Jio, Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki and Kalinga visited the campus for placements.
The training and placement department of our university is most active, and it helps students to do their summer training and also internships in the industry.

review_summary.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.

content.Placements: On the first day of my college, I saw many students in different courses. I am studying BCA from ITM. This year, they have started one summer internship of 1 month and another in the final year which we have to do internships in the last semester. In education, they support us a lot. I just now finished my summer internship and we are asked to find internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.

content.Placements: Students are not placed yet as we are the 2nd batch, and 1st batch is in 3rd year. Our course is 4.5 years. As I told you, seniors are the 1st batch, they are in the 3rd year now. In our university, the highest package is 13.5 LPA for batch students. We have a compulsory internship for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Every teacher is very free with students.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are pretty good compared to others. The ROI (Return on Investment) is very good in our college compared to other colleges. A lot of students get internships from our course, around 45 to 50, in companies like Google, Boast, Lenskart, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very neat. Classrooms are very perfect. There is no noise pollution. Wi-Fi was a problem before, but it has been cleared. The library is very huge. Every book is available and easy to access. The library is also clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Education-wise, I rate it 8 out of 10.

content.Placements: I am a second-year physiotherapy student. From my point of view, the university has really good placements. My seniors get placed in good organizations.
content.Infrastructure: ITM has an amazing campus life with the best faculty. The classrooms, libraries, and labs are very good. There is an issue with the network connection, but the infrastructure of the college is good. As I am a day scholar, I don’t know much about the hostel. However, I have heard from my classmates that the rooms are very good and the canteen food is okay. The management here is somewhat strict, which is necessary for our benefit. The college also has its hospital, which is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members keep an eye on every student. Other curricular activities are limited.

content.Placements: Yes, if one is well qualified and has skills then he/she will get the placement. In the end for placements skills matters irrespective of an organization or CGPA. The previous batch of our students got the placement from and outside the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Currently pursuing BCA. It is the GATEway for an individual in the teaching field, it is open to all students with or without a science background. It will help the overall development of an individual in the teaching field. Some labs are insane and have nice sitting arrangements.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission process 2026

paragraphs: ITM SLS Baroda University admission 2026is currently open. ITM (SLS) Baroda offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma courses. To get admission toITM SLS Baroda University, meet the eligibility criteria of the preferred course. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Design, Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, etc. The application process at ITM SLS Baroda University is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutITM SLS Baroda Universitycourse admission2026.

ITM SLS Baroda University courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam and merit basis. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular ITM SLS Baroda University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreITM SLS Baroda University courses

ITM SLS Baroda University has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into ITM SLS Baroda University. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university post where interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the ITM SLS Baroda University programmes is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of ITM SLS Baroda University, before filling out the admission form. Interested candidates can check below the complete ITM SLS Baroda University admission process:
Step 1: ITM SLS Baroda University Application Process
The mode of ITM SLS Baroda University application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill the online application form.
Step 2: ITM SLS Baroda University Selection rounds
ITM SLS Baroda University shortlists candidates either based on merit or entrance exam. After shortlisting candidates, selected candidates receive a provisional admission letter.
Step 3: Final Admission confirmation
To confirm admission at ITM SLS Baroda University, selected candidates need to pay theITM SLS Baroda University feeand visit the university campus for the document verification process.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: ITM SLS Baroda University offers 32 courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels in multiple streams like Management, Engineering, Computer Applications, etc. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for UG courses. Bachelor's degree is required to apply for any of the ITM University PG course. Admission is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA course at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA is based on CAT/ CMAT score. Additionally, candidates must hold bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC/ EWS) to apply for MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for MBA is INR 1.80 lakh.

faqs.question: Is studying at ITM (SLS) Baroda University expensive?
faqs.answer: The fee structure is different for various courses at ITM SLS Baroda University. Students can check the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.9 lakhBBAINR 2.6 lakhMBAINR 1.9 lakh-INR 2.6 lakhBCAINR 1.9 lakhBPharmaINR 4 lakhBScINR 1.6 lakh-INR 3.6 lakhNote:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BBA (Hons) at ITM SLS Baroda University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent exam from any recognised central/ state board or school can apply for BBA (Hons) course. Additionally, the university will shortlist candidates for BBA (Hons) based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for BBA (Hons) is INR 2.6 lakh.

placement_data.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official data released by the University, the highest package offered during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024 stood at INR 43 LPA . Further, the average package offered in 2024 was INR 4 LPA . More than 900 companies visited the campus and 90% of the total students were placed during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024.

There is a dedicated team of Training and Placement Cell at ITMBU responsible for suitably placing students according to their Aptitude, Scores, Attendance, Caliber & Competence. To enhance employability, the cell offers: Aptitude/Technical Tests, Internships, Career Tracks, Mock Interviews, and a Placement Office.

description: ITM (SLS) Baroda University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. ITM (SLS) Baroda University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, ITM (SLS) Baroda University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 29066 to 50185 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Information Technology and B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering (Vlsi Design and Technology) were the most competitive for admission in the Genera

GUJCET 2025 cutoff ranks for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course range between 29066 to 50185 in the General HS category. B.Tech. in Information Technology emerged as the most competitive specialisation for admission, with a last round closing rank of 29066 under the HS quota.
To view the detailed cutoff ranks across different categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options provided below:

reviews.review_heading: Good vibes, good campus, and good placements. Overall worth it!

Hostel rooms are available in AC and non-AC in both options also including meals like breakfast lunch and dinner daily. The university has its hospital providing service to students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good education provides good success.

Our university has various amenities for sports enthusiastic students like a cricket ground, basketball court, and badminton court. There is an amazing gazebo in our university to utilize in our free time.

reviews.review_heading: Best choice for pursuing MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. We have a clean water facility, library facility, canteen facility, and classes with very comfortable seating arrangements. Also, we have a place like Gazibo to chit-chat with our friends. So ITM provides great infrastructure to its students.

reviews.review_heading: As a MBA student I'm absolutely satisfied with the teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well developed. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which enhance learning experience. The campus is clean, well maintained, and provides professional atmosphere. The canteen deserves special mention and it offers good food at reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: MBA programme is for better future & placement.
reviews.review_text: The university has labs and a library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It offers good quality hygienic food, and the campus is also very aesthetic. The campus has very good vibes & location.

reviews.review_heading: It provides great courses and a decent stay as well.
reviews.review_text: Labs and infrastructure are modern. Hostels are clean and secure. It offers decent and tasty food. It should improve in Wi-Fi and recreation facilities for better students comfort.

faqs.answer: A:    Farid, Baba For admission to its programmes, the University of Health Sciences normally takes scores from multiple entrance tests. Depending on the course, the specific entry examinations may differ. The NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) results are frequently considered by the university for medical programmes such as MBBS, BDS, or nursing. For other programmes, such as B.Sc. and M.Sc. the university consider marks scores in 10+2.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Baba Farid University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) accepts NEET UG scores for admission to MBBS courses. NEET UG is a national-level entrance exam conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission to undergraduate medical courses in India. Candidates who have qualified for NEET UG are eligible to apply for admission to MBBS courses at BFUHS. The cutoff marks and ranks for different categories under the NEET UG for MBBS at BFUHS are available in a PDF document on the official website of the university.

review_content.Placements: All students are asked if they want to work in the hospital or not, and based on the interview, they get placements in different hospital departments. You have to work in shifts, morning, evening, and night, even during your student life. You can't even close your eyes during night duty, even if there is no work. Although no stipend is provided during the internship, you will gain a lot of practical exposure.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has a gym, mess, and TV room, but none of the gym equipment works, and the TV subscription is not even renewed. There is a large ground and a basketball court. The rooms are small considering the number of people living in them. The food is average, with no fruits or milk served. The canteen is too expensive, and online food delivery is not allowed. Outings are also prohibited, and parents are not allowed to enter the campus unless the warden gives permission. While it is understandable that parents cannot enter the hostel rooms, they are not even allowed inside the college campus.

review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs, library, classrooms, and hall are present. College infrastructure is good. In our hostel, the food, rooms, and medical facilities are good. admission_process.title: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Baba Farid University Admission 2025 is entirely entrance-based for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The university offers UG, PG, and doctoral-level programmes in the field of medical sciences.Baba Farid UniversityMBBS and BDS admissions are done through NEET-UG, while MD and MS admissions are conducted throughNEET-PG. For nursing and allied health sciences programmes, admissions are based on merit or specific entrance exams as per university guidelines.

Baba Farid University admission 2025 is open. The University carries out an online mode of application for all the courses. The University offers MBBS, BDS, MSc, MPT, and PhD programmes Admission to MBBS is based on NEET., the college accepts PUNJAB NEET, NEET scores. Check the below table forBaba Farid University courseeligibility & selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation with 50%
NEET PGPunjab NEET PG
Graduation with 50%
Merit-based in Bachelor's Degree

Baba Farid University admission process 2025 is open for all courses. The institute offers entrance and merit-based admission to its UG and PG courses in the medical field. Candidates must complete the admission process for admission. Check below the Baba Farid Universityadmission process 2025:
Step 1: Baba Farid University Application Process 2025
Candidates looking for admission to Baba Farid University in any course are required to apply on the official website of the institute.
Step 2: Baba Farid University Selection Round

Baba Farid University admission is based on the entrance exam as well as merit for all the courses. The college selects candidates for MBBS based on NEET and NEET Punjab. It accepts NEET PG and NEET PG Punjab exam scores for MD courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must payBaba Farid University feethe to lock in the final seats.

The B.Sc. course provides foundation knowledge to be used by students as a stepping stone for various healthcare careers or further studies.

paragraphs: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences has not released the official placement statistics. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, around 80% of the batch gets placed every year. The BFUHS highest package offered in the recent drives was INR 10 LPA . Further, the lowest package and average package stood at INR 3.37 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. tables.context: How are the placements at Baba Farid University of

faqs.question: How are the placements at Baba Farid University of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the official placement report or brochure. As per the unofficial sources, the highest package offered to the recently passed out students was INR 10 LPA. Check the complete insights of BFUHS placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics Placement rate 80% the lowest package INR 3.37 LPA Average package INR 5 LPA the highest package INR 10 LPA NOTE: The above statistics are collated from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: How are MBBS placements at Baba Farid University?
faqs.answer: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has a dedicated training and career guidance center for placing students in their desired job roles and training them to be ready for the workplace early on in their careers. According to the placement report of 2023, the placement rate at BFUHS was 80%, and the average package offered was INR 5 LPA, with the highest package being INR 10-12 LPA. Around 120 students got placed in the college, with top roles offered being MD and MS. Students also got placed as medical officers in government and civil services. The university helps students find top jobs in companies and organizations related to their field by providing placement assistance. The BFUHS placement cell in the Faridkot campus is in charge of all placement-related tasks and prepares students for recruitment drives. The university also offers a variety of programs to develop students' skills and get them ready for impending challenges in the workplace.

faqs.question: Does BFUHS offer internships to MBBS students?
faqs.answer: Yes, BFUHS offers internships to MBBS students. The course is of the duration of 5.5 years, from which the initial 4.5 years are to complete the course curriculum. Further, in the last year of the course, candidates are obliged to go through a mandatory internship. The internships are usually well paid.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Clean government hospital and hostel. Clear hospital, well-furnished OTs, various departments, Neurosurgery, Plastic surgery, Urology, Paediatric surgery, Neurology wing, Derma, Dental wing, Medicine wards, Mother and child block, Different M.Ch. Buildings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government Medical College, AmritsarReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GMC Amritsar - A good option or not?
reviews.review_text: There are excellent facilities available in college with excellent Wi-Fi and air conditioning running in classrooms. There are lecture theatre, library, and labs. The quality of food available in mess is excellent. Canteen is also good. There are various game courts on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dayanand Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 15 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Real colors of DMC&H, college of nursing, Ludhiana, Malakpur.
reviews.review_text: College has a gym, mess, and TV room, but none of the gym equipment works, and the TV subscription is not even renewed. There is a large ground and a basketball court. The rooms are small considering the number of people living in them. The food is average, with no fruits or milk served. The canteen is too expensive, and online food delivery is not allowed. Outings are also prohibited, and parents are not allowed to enter the campus unless the warden gives permission. While it is understandable ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Meera College of NursingReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good and excellent performance in nearby areas.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, library, classrooms, and hall are present. College infrastructure is good. In our hostel, the food, rooms, and medical facilities are good. In hot weather, proper arrangements are made for students to use cooling devices. In hostel, the rooms are average. There are 4 students in each room.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Medical College, AmritsarReviewed on 27 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Government Medical College, Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: The college offers great infrastructure. The library has good facilities, including study cabins for each student, a well-stocked library with all standard books, and air conditioning. The study environment is also excellent for studying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of Nursing, Government Rajindra HospitalReviewed on 27 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college if you want to have more clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus and the hostel is okay. Hostel rooms are not that wide, but the hostel expenses are too much, which makes the government college as costly as a private one. The hostel doesn't have any Wi-Fi facility. There is no canteen available inside the hostel, but outside there is a small one.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Dayanand Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 25 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was in the college premises, but that building has now been transformed into the administrative block. At present, there are no hostel facilities. But, there was a college canteen inside the college premises.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Medical College, AmritsarReviewed on 23 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Completing MBBS in GMC Amritsar is the best and fulfill your dreams.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are best and hostels are also well maintained. Food in the mess is of good quality and we have all the sports facilities. There are 4 boys hostels and 3 girls hostels. Each hostel has different mess. We can eat wherever we want. Every year, there is a sports tournament.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Luxmi Bai Institute of Dental Sciences and HospitalReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty was great.
reviews.review_text: The college had centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, well-equipped labs, a library, and an auditorium. The college had renovated hostels, a gymnasium, a sports complex, and a playground. The hostel rooms were great and fully furnished with attached washrooms. The hostel had an attached lawn within its premises. It also had its mess, and the food quality was great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Dayanand Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 31 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review about Dayanand Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities of my college were quite good. Every week, the hostel food was checked by nutritionists. Apart from this, only three students lived in a room, but if someone wanted to live alone, they were also given permission for that. The college also provided bus facilities for hostellers.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government Medical College, AmritsarReviewed on 24 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best medical college for new found freedom after NEET.
reviews.review_text: Buildings need some development, the ones that are quite old but everything is available. We have Wi-Fi in hostel. Library is pretty nice. Hostels are pretty decent, now there's a new block built for boys which is much better so hostels would not be a problem. We have one the best grounds and sports, there's CISCO for indoor games and a well-made gymnasium. All the departments have good facilities, again I'll say they are a bit outdated but available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 9 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has decent infrastructure with AC rooms, functional labs and good Wi-Fi access in academic blocks. Hostel rooms are average but livable with regular water and electrical supply. The food in the mess is nutritional, but not very tasty. The canteen has limited options.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Saraswati Group of CollegesReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Balanced academic experience with good Ayurvedic exposure and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Saraswati Ayurved Hospital and Medical College offers a range of facilities to the support both academic and personal development. The college campus is equipped with modern classrooms that are spacious, well-ventilated, and fitted with audio-visual aids to enhance learning.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Guru Nanak Dev Dental College and Research InstituteReviewed on 8 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the perfect college for dental courses.
reviews.review_text: Well-furnished classrooms with projectors are spacious. Wi-Fi services are provided in the college and hostels. There is a spacious lecture theater. Fresh food is given in hostels, taking care of hygiene and student health. The canteen is there, where different types of food items are cooked. A medical store is there, and a stocked shop for every kind of daily life requirement. A basketball ground and a volleyball area are also there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Government Medical College, AmritsarReviewed on 1 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a really great college with good faculty, excellent sports infrastructure, and food quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a little old, so buildings are also old-fashioned, but facilities are up to the mark. There are both old and new hostels available, and the food quality in the mess is excellent. Two canteens are available on campus, and medical facilities are excellent too. It has sports grounds for football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, tennis, handball, and an indoor court for badminton. A swimming pool, gym, pool table, table tennis, and board games are also available at CISCO.
