review_summary.college_name: Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive and challenging: A transformative journey in medical education.

content.Placements: The MBBS course is a 5.5-year undergraduate program in medicine, including 4.5 years of academic study and 1 year of compulsory internship. Each batch usually starts annually and includes subjects like anatomy, physiology, pharmacology, surgery, and medicine.
content.Infrastructure: The college has modern lecture halls, dissection labs, clinical skill labs, and well-equipped departments for anatomy, physiology, etc. A library with medical journals, computer labs, and access to a teaching hospital for hands-on training. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, furnished rooms (single/shared), mess facilities, 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, common rooms, recreation areas, and sometimes gym or sports facilities. Cleanliness and medical support are generally ensured.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college to study MBBS for those who just passed in NEET.

content.Placements: Nearly 80 to 90% of students were placed. The package for MBBS course was about 25 LPA. Our college had its own hospital and many specialisations. Nearly 100% of students got internships in many hospitals in Pondicherry as MBBS certified doctors, one of the best colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had its own hostel for girls and boys separately with food mess inside. There were separate labs for each subject with the required equipments. Library was big with many books. Hostel had morning breakfast, afternoon lunch, evening snacks, and night dinner. The food will differ daily in the hostel. We also had a gym room.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Faculty and infrastructure, management.

content.Placements: 150 students were in the batch. Five years ago, the highest package was 18 Lacs per year for a 4.5-year course with 1 year of internship. All students passed out with a 100 percent result. During the internship, we worked in a hospital where patient flow was good, allowing us to see and diagnose many cases.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available, along with hostels and a mess. The sports ground and other games facilities are provided. The food in the mess is not that great, as it mostly features South Indian dishes like idli, dosa, and chicken, which makes it difficult for vegetarians. The hospital staff is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it has good faculty members, a friendly environment, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: We get placements. According to the latest NMC guidelines, you are offered a mandatory 1-year internship program at the same college along with a monthly stipend.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Rooms are spacious. We have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. There are mess facilities inside the hostel. Gym facilities are provided in both the hostels. The food is good compared to the quality of other hostels. Smart and centrally air-conditioned lecture halls, canteens, a cricket ground, a basketball court, badminton courts, and many more are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: You can join this college and pursue great future here.

content.Placements: Our college posses a great pass percentage. The recruiting opportunities are also good, and the internship percentage was good. After passing out fro college you will get good jobs. MBBS was the top course offered. The college is located in a good area.
content.Infrastructure: Hospital is with great infrastructure and labs are provided from the first year itself and are very good. The library is with all the great books and air-conditioned classrooms. Good Wi-Fi facilities are provided to students. Cleaning in the hostel is good. The mess and canteen serve good food. Indoor and outdoor games are provided to students.

description: Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 731798 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science MBBS cutoff 2025 was 731798 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 90951 to 202171. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Radiodiagnosis and MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 90951, 128426 and 135247, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Lakshmi Narayana Institute of Medical Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive and challenging: A transformative journey in medical education.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern lecture halls, dissection labs, clinical skill labs, and well-equipped departments for anatomy, physiology, etc. A library with medical journals, computer labs, and access to a teaching hospital for hands-on training. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, furnished rooms (single/shared), mess facilities, 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, common rooms, recreation areas, and sometimes gym or sports facilities. Cleanliness and medical support are generally ensured.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study MBBS for those who just passed in NEET.
reviews.review_text: Our college had its own hostel for girls and boys separately with food mess inside. There were separate labs for each subject with the required equipments. Library was big with many books. Hostel had morning breakfast, afternoon lunch, evening snacks, and night dinner. The food will differ daily in the hostel. We also had a gym room.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and infrastructure, management.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available, along with hostels and a mess. The sports ground and other games facilities are provided. The food in the mess is not that great, as it mostly features South Indian dishes like idli, dosa, and chicken, which makes it difficult for vegetarians. The hospital staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it has good faculty members, a friendly environment, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Rooms are spacious. We have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. There are mess facilities inside the hostel. Gym facilities are provided in both the hostels. The food is good compared to the quality of other hostels. Smart and centrally air-conditioned lecture halls, canteens, a cricket ground, a basketball court, badminton courts, and many more are available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join this college and pursue great future here.
reviews.review_text: Hospital is with great infrastructure and labs are provided from the first year itself and are very good. The library is with all the great books and air-conditioned classrooms. Good Wi-Fi facilities are provided to students. Cleaning in the hostel is good. The mess and canteen serve good food. Indoor and outdoor games are provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: I got admission here based on NEET rank. Everything is good with well-experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are like a library, playground, 2 canteens, huge lawn and widespread greenery. Hospital with all department separate wards is also available here. Food and hostel could be better. Wi-Fi is provided in classrooms. Photostat facility is also provided so that we don't have to go outside. There is a reading room which can be used by the students anytime.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provided good placements in the year 2019.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms had separate projectors, which was good to attend the class. Wi-Fi was available all the time in all the departments and even in the central library. Classrooms were quite good. All the departments had separate labs and separate demonstration rooms. The central library is open from 8:00 am to evening 8:00 pm, and it consisted of all the books related to various departments.

reviews.review_heading: I am blessed to study here.
reviews.review_text:
Full air conditioned classrooms. 
Advanced projector and pointer.  
24*7 library. 
Hostel food excellent.  
Big ground for everyone to play. 
The best thing about the hostel is food. 
Best quality and menu is prepared by mess representative. 
Pharmacy is inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Still, they are going to increase the buildings. Classrooms are neat and good. All the classrooms are in good air conditioning. There is a separate ground for college, which is common for both men and women in front of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is the best here. Labs are good. Classrooms are good and air-conditioned. There is a well-equipped library, and it is good and always offers a peaceful environment. In the hostel, the food served is good, and the weekly twice non-vegetarian dish is served. They are giving and allotting food with calories. Canteen is the best. Sports and games also have good coaches.

reviews.review_heading: A place to make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are there in the hostel. The quality of the food is excellent. Classroom, labs and library are clean. Wi-Fi is provided 24 hours and a gym is also there for students. Fully air conditioned classrooms and library are there. Sports and games are played every month.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful for joining Narayana Medical College.
reviews.review_text:
College has Wi-Fi, library facilities. Classrooms are wide with AC facility. College has very well-equipped medical labs. Canteen food are not much good. 
Hostel rooms are sufficient with well-equipped infrastructure and there is no infrastructure related issues in the college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DMCH has good academics and a good campus life.

content.Placements: There are 120 students in one batch of MBBS. No packages are offered by any company. We complete our course, and after MBBS, we either go for PG entrance exams or join as a Junior Resident JR in a hospital. A JR works three days a week and receives a salary of around Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000.
content.Infrastructure: We have 8-9 boys' hostels for each batch. PG hostels are separate for unmarried and married students. There are only two girls' hostels. Nearly all hostels are in a tragic condition with no annual maintenance. During the rainy season, snakes can also be seen in hostels.

individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure needs some repair, overall a good college.

content.Placements: There is no system of placement in a medical college, yet many of my seniors are in eminent hospitals now and many have decided to go for private establishments of their own. There is no concept of companies choosing students for themselves like in engineering colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure needs to improve a lot and could use some extra funds from the government. We have a well-equipped library, functional hospital, state of the art lecture theater, but buildings of hostels and hospital needs to be repaired as soon as possible.

reviews.review_heading: DMCH has good academics and a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: We have 8-9 boys' hostels for each batch. PG hostels are separate for unmarried and married students. There are only two girls' hostels. Nearly all hostels are in a tragic condition with no annual maintenance. During the rainy season, snakes can also be seen in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a very fine place to learn and become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and faculties that are present in my college are a very good thing. There are many testing labs and other things that help us students to study properly. They are the kind of things that help other students also in their moral life to become doctors. The qualities of facilities in my hostel and the college infrastructure are that every student gets a single room. Routinely organised. Medical facilities are available within walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: DMCH. A real gem? To Bihar.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Infrastructure growing day by day. Construction never stops. More than 10 hostels. Many more wards. Goes on ever increasing infrastructure. May develop soon in aims. Located in the heart of city. Ranked in many articles among tops.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is poor but study and patient flow is superb best college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine but infrastructure is very poor. Here at sports week there are allot of sports played in college cricket football badminton chess etc. Sarasawati is famous of this college patient flow of this hospital is quiet impressive teachers are so cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure needs some repair, overall a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure needs to improve a lot and could use some extra funds from the government. We have a well-equipped library, functional hospital, state of the art lecture theater, but buildings of hostels and hospital needs to be repaired as soon as possible.

review_summary.college_name: MKCG Medical College, Berhampur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: MKCG: A beautiful experience that prepares you for a bright future.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the top colleges for MBBS in Odisha. There is nearly 100% placement after the completion of the courses there are many permanent and contractual government posts available. Some students prepare for PG courses, while others find roles in private medical facilities as healthcare providers. Average packages range from 5 LPA to 10 LPA. There is a compulsory one-year internship for all students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are top-notch, with nice hostels with a beautiful and clean campus. The mess food is good and healthy. There are playgrounds for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. Additionally, there are refreshment corners for coffee and snacks on campus. Hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members, infrastructure, and placements.

content.Placements: Around 250 students from our batch got placed. The starting salary offered is Rs.30,000 per month and the highest salary offered is 1.5 LPM. Top recruiters are AIIMS, SCB, M.Ch., etc. Every student gets internships in our course. Few students pursue PG, MD, or MS.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostels is very good and hygienic. There are proper medical facilities and sports. Students can play chess, volleyball, football, and table tennis. The hostel provides Wi-Fi connection to students.

individual_reviews.title: Very good college for medical studies.

content.Infrastructure: Hostel is spacious, and electricity and water are available 24*7. Hygiene is properly maintained in the hostel. Food is healthy and nutritious, breakfast, lunch, and dinner are available. As it is a medical college, medical facilities are properly maintained. Sports and games are open to all students.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is very helpful for being a good doctor in future.

The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12593 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

MKCG Medical College, Berhampur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 12593 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12670 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: MKCG: A beautiful experience that prepares you for a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are top-notch, with nice hostels with a beautiful and clean campus. The mess food is good and healthy. There are playgrounds for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. Additionally, there are refreshment corners for coffee and snacks on campus. Hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, infrastructure, and placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostels is very good and hygienic. There are proper medical facilities and sports. Students can play chess, volleyball, football, and table tennis. The hostel provides Wi-Fi connection to students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for medical studies.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is spacious, and electricity and water are available 24*7. Hygiene is properly maintained in the hostel. Food is healthy and nutritious, breakfast, lunch, and dinner are available. As it is a medical college, medical facilities are properly maintained. Sports and games are open to all students.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college to students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were available on campus. The food quality was good. Annual athletic games were held on campus. There was a beach nearby our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very helpful for being a good doctor in future.
reviews.review_text: Campus is very good with many facilities. Hostel is well settled and clean with many facilities such as 24 hours water and electricity. There is a beautiful study room. It serves well-cooked and delicious food. There are 24 hours medical services.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a place to strive, serve and care.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 lecture theaters with a capacity of 300 students. All are centrally air-conditioned, fitted with jammers, to check the negative usage of internet, and Wi-Fi. There is a 6-story laboratory building, centrally air-conditioners, Wi-Fi, ELISA facility, multi utility centrifuge systems, backed for culture sensitivity testing, and pathological facilities to evaluate biopsy, and smears. Our laboratory complex houses, all non-clinical and para-clinical facilities. Rest every other clinical d...

reviews.review_heading: I am right now dissatisfied due to faculty issues.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has accommodation with a mess and a canteen within it. The rooms are average, not bad though. Food is awesome and the electricity bills are paid once a year included in our hostel fee. Sports and games are played here not frequently but definitely.

reviews.review_heading: It may not be the college of your dreams but makes your dreams become reality.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the classrooms are fully equipped for digital learning with centralised air-conditioner and Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are fully air-conditioned with the proper availability of the required apparatus. There is a central library which is a 5-storeyed building with Wi-Fi and centralised air-conditioned with the availability of almost all medical literature books relevant to the courses offered.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government medical college in Southern Odisha with excellent alumni and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, classrooms, and hostels are very good with all basic amenities like canteen, gym, free Wi-Fi, indoor and outdoor games like volleyball, badminton, table tennis, cricket, football, etc. Food quality is good, very healthy, and nutritious with an average Indian diet.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure facilities of our college.
reviews.review_text: We have college library facilities along with a hostel library, Wi-Fi connection, and smart classes by e-learning process. Our college has a good quality of infrastructure and food in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and sports like football, volleyball, cricket, badminton, table tennis, etc. are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good, and fine college. Its doctors are also good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is fine, and Wi-Fi and the library are provided by the college. The hostel's food is fine, no water problem, and its food quality is good. Its surrounding is very clean. The campus is clean. All the games instruments give to play with each other in the playground by our superintendents.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very highly recommended institute in the state.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Classes are well-equipped with air conditioners and digital boards for better teaching. Labs have all the necessary practical equipment. Libraries are well-equipped with all the needed materials manuals books magazines.

reviews.review_heading: It is the healing center of South Odisha and then of budding doctors.
reviews.review_text: It has a huge campus, Wi-Fi, a modern library, and every super specialisation branch. You will have a good hostel facility with minimum cost. There is the availability of single rooms. The food served in a mess is average, and you can have some special south Odisha items. You can also enjoy the local foods, and there are restaurants.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus for doctor aspirants.
reviews.review_text: It has a huge academic block with Wi-Fi enabled. Our classes and practicals occur in that block and respective departments. It is a hospital campus, so the place is crowded always. We have a canteen for the hostel that provides delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Our college owns around 160 acres of huge land in Berhampur city. The campus has separate academic blocks, departmental blocks, auditoriums and meeting halls. There is a huge central library with around 8,000 books, more than 50 journals and newspapers. Lecture theatres and the library are air-conditioned with free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are smart with projectors, big LED screens and speakerphones for professors. Our college has 4 boys MBBS hostels and 3 ladies hostels, and there is a separate hostel...
